param.name: home
param.comment: Home anchor (sector or station) for supply operations

param.name: assignHome
param.comment: When home is a station: assign ship as station trade subordinate

input_param.name: max
input_param.value: [if (global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly) then 25 else (if (this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level?) then (if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 2 then 1 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 5 then 3 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 8 then 5 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 11 then 10 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 13 then 15 else 25) else 1), 1].max

input_param.name: max
input_param.value: [if (global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly) then 25 else (if (this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level?) then (if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 2 then 1 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 5 then 3 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 8 then 5 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 11 then 10 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 13 then 15 else 25) else 1), 1].max

param.name: buyFromPlayer
param.comment: Player supplier priority: 0 = exclude player-owned suppliers, 1-10 = preference vs faction suppliers

param.name: buyFromFaction
param.comment: Faction supplier priority: 0 = exclude non-player suppliers, 1-10 = preference vs player suppliers

param.name: backtrackTolerance
param.comment: Extra jumps tolerated when chaining suppliers

set_value.name: $dataSource
set_value.exact: if (event.param2? and event.param2 != null) then 'param2' else 'global storage'

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': GT_Trade_Found signal received via interrupt handler - stored ' + $signalTradeList.count + ' trades from ' + $dataSource
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': GT_Trade_Found signal received but trade list is empty - ignoring (no interrupt flag set)'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': GT_Search_Go captured via global interrupt (phase=' + $searchGoPhase + ')'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': 🎓 Training station found: ' + $trainingStation.knownname + ' for level ' + $requiredLevel + ' (academy=' + $isAcademy + ', immediate=' + $useImmediate + ')'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': DockAndTrain order created for ' + $trainingStation.knownname

handler.comment: Detect stations entering radar range for mobile satellite intelligence

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI-Intel] ' + this.ship.idcode + ' detected ' + $detectedStations.count + ' station(s) - processing ' + $stationsToProcess

set_value.name: $_broadcasted
set_value.exact: if ($pilotLevel ge 6 and $_broadcastAllowed and $threatLevel ge $threshold) then 'YES' else 'NO'

set_value.name: $_broadcastReason
set_value.exact: if $pilotLevel lt 6 then 'PILOT LEVEL TOO LOW (Lv.' + $pilotLevel + ', requires Lv.6+)' else if not $_broadcastAllowed then 'THROTTLED' else if $threatLevel lt $threshold then 'THREAT BELOW THRESHOLD' else 'OK'

debug_text.text: '[GT-Threat-Detect] ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (Pilot Lv.' + $pilotLevel + ') in ' + this.sector.knownname + ' - hostiles=' + $hostileCount + ' (XL=' + $shipClass_XL + ', L=' + $shipClass_L + ', M=' + $shipClass_M + ', S=' + $shipClass_S + ')' + ', threatScore=' + $threatScore + ', threatLevel=' + $threatLevel + ', threshold=' + $threshold + ', primaryFaction=' + $_primaryFactionName + ', broadcasted=' + $_broadcasted + ' (' + $_broadcastReason + ')'

handler.comment: Subordinate resync on commander order change

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Commander order changed - restarting to resync settings'

do_if.value: $newCommander.defaultorder? and ((@$newCommander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @$newCommander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') or (@$newCommander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $newCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and (@$newCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @$newCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2')))

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] PHASE 6: Commander change detected for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (commander: ' + (if @$newCommander.exists then @$newCommander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', has GT: ' + $newCommanderHasGT + ')'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Training completed for level ' + $completedLevel + ' - setting flag to resume trading'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Ignoring spurious training-complete signal (level=' + $completedLevel + ', academy/timer still active)'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Training failed: ' + $reason + ' - setting flag to resume trading'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Training failed (' + $reason + ') but pilot still blocked - not resuming trading'

do_if.value: not $hasDirectGTOrder and this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship

this.ship.commander.defaultorder? and ((@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') or (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2')))

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] PHASE 7: GT order cancelled for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (interrupt handler, cancelled order: ' + (if $cancelledOrderId then $cancelledOrderId else 'NONE') + ', current default: ' + (if $currentDefaultOrder then $currentDefaultOrder else 'NONE') + ', still GT-controlled: ' + $isGTControlled + ')'

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Ship = this.ship, $Pilot = this.ship.pilot, $Reason = 'GT order cancelled - restoring original name', $OriginalName = $originalName ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] PHASE 7: Name restoration signal sent for ' + this.ship.idcode

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Order cancelled interrupt fired but ship still GT-controlled (cancelled: ' + (if $cancelledOrderId then $cancelledOrderId else 'NONE') + ', current default: ' + (if $currentDefaultOrder then $currentDefaultOrder else 'NONE') + ', still GT-controlled: ' + $isGTControlled + ') - skipping Phase 7'

do_if.value: this.ship.order? and (this.ship.order.id == 'Resupply' or this.ship.order.id == 'Repair' or this.ship.order.id == 'Equip')

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Cleared stale resupply tracking (no active order)'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Resupply order still active after save load - keeping tracking'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': === INIT BLOCK STARTED === (Ship: ' + this.ship.knownname + ', Pilot: ' + (if this.ship.pilot then this.ship.pilot.name else 'NONE') + ')'

do_if.value: this.ship.commander and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship and not this.ship.commander.isclass.station

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Subordinate inheriting home base from commander ' + this.ship.commander.idcode + ': ' + $effectiveHome.knownname

set_value.name: $initMk4HomeSector
set_value.exact: if this.$effectiveHome? and this.$effectiveHome.isclass.sector then this.$effectiveHome else (if this.$effectiveHome? and this.$effectiveHome.sector? then @this.$effectiveHome.sector else null)

do_if.value: (not this.ship.commander.exists or this.ship.commander == this.ship or this.ship.commander.isclass.station) and this.ship.commander != this.$effectiveHome

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Removed old commander before station assignment'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Assigned to station ' + this.$effectiveHome.knownname + ' as trade subordinate'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Removed station assignment — home changed to sector ' + this.$effectiveHome.knownname

set_value.name: $isSubordinate
set_value.exact: this.ship.commander and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship and not this.ship.commander.isclass.station

set_value.name: $psJump
set_value.exact: if (this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level?) then global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level else null

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Subordinate inheriting sector whitelist from commander ' + this.ship.commander.idcode

set_value.name: $effectiveWareBasket
set_value.exact: if $warebasket? and $warebasket.count gt 0 then $warebasket else (if $specialWareBasket? then $specialWareBasket else [])

set_value.name: $pilotSkill
set_value.exact: if $useVanillaXPOnly then (if this.ship.pilot? and this.ship.pilot.skill.piloting? then this.ship.pilot.skill.piloting else null) else (if this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level? then global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level else null)

set_value.name: $mk4DedicatedServe
set_value.exact: if $serveHomeOnly? then $serveHomeOnly else (if $dedicatedServe? then $dedicatedServe else false)

set_value.name: $mk4AllowPlayerSuppliers
set_value.exact: if $buyFromPlayer? then $buyFromPlayer else (if $allowPlayerSuppliers? then $allowPlayerSuppliers else true)

set_value.name: $mk4AllowAiSuppliers
set_value.exact: if $buyFromFaction? then $buyFromFaction else (if $allowAiSuppliers? then $allowAiSuppliers else true)

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Subordinate inherited settings from ' + this.ship.commander.idcode + ': ' + $inheritedSettingsText

set_value.name: $debugchance
set_value.exact: if $gt_debuglevel ge 2 then 100 else if $gt_debuglevel ge 1 then 50 else 0

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': High-performance initialization complete'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Operating with home base: ' + @$effectiveHome.knownname + ' (maxbuy=' + $effectiveMaxBuy + ', maxsell=' + $effectiveMaxSell + ')'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': === CONFIGURATION SUMMARY ==='
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Illegal=' + $effectiveAllowIllegal + ', IllegalRouteFilter=' + $effectiveEnforceRouteIllegalLegality + ', DistancePenalty=' + $effectiveDistancePenalty + '%'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': FleetCoord=' + $effectiveFleetCoordination + ', LogbookEntries=' + $effectiveLogbookEntries
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Distance limits: MaxBuy=' + $effectiveMaxBuy + ' jumps, MaxSell=' + $effectiveMaxSell + ' jumps'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': AutoWares=' + $effectiveAutoWares + ', WareBasket=' + $effectiveWareBasket.count + ' wares, TradeEval=' + $effectiveTradeEval
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Tracking pilot: ' + @this.$trackedPilot.name + ' (event-driven detection enabled)'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': INITIAL REGISTRATION: Registering pilot ' + @this.ship.pilot.name + ' on order start'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': === INITIALIZATION COMPLETE === Starting main trading loop...'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': === ATTENTION BLOCK ENTERED ==='

do_if.value: global.$GT_ActiveTrade? and global.$GT_ActiveTrade.{this.ship}? and this.ship.cargo.free.all ge this.ship.cargo.capacity.all

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': PILOT CHANGE DETECTED on script restart! Old: ' + @this.$trackedPilot.name + ', New: ' + @$currentPilot.name

do_if.value: $candidatePilot and global.$GT_Pilots.{$candidatePilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$candidatePilot}.$ShipID? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$candidatePilot}.$ShipID == this.ship.idcode and global.$GT_Pilots.{$candidatePilot}.$Status? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$candidatePilot}.$Status == 'paused'

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Missing pilot but transfer is in progress for ' + $pendingPilotName + ' (elapsed=' + ($pendingTransferElapsed / 1s) + 's) - waiting before cancellation'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': MISSING PILOT DETECTED - pilot was transferred away, cleaning up and self-canceling GT order'

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Ship = this.ship, $Pilot = null, $Reason = 'Pilot transferred away - GT order cannot run without pilot', $OriginalName = $originalName ]

do_if.value: global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$BlockedLevel? and not global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$XPBlocked? and not (global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly)

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] Restored XPBlocked for pilot ' + this.ship.pilot.name + ' on ship restart (BlockedLevel: ' + global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$BlockedLevel + ')'
'[GT-AI] Updated ship name to show ADVANCE label after XPBlocked restoration: ' + this.ship.knownname
'[GT-AI] GT order assigned to ' + this.ship.idcode + ' - sending GT_Order_Assigned signal'
'[GT-AI] GT order reassigned to ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (old: ' + this.$trackedDefaultOrder + ', new: ' + $currentDefaultOrder + ') - sending GT_Order_Assigned signal'

do_if.value: not $isStillGTControlled and this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship

this.ship.commander.defaultorder? and ((@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') or (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2')))

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] PHASE 7: GT order cancelled for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (detected in init label, old: ' + this.$trackedDefaultOrder + ', new: ' + (if $currentDefaultOrder then $currentDefaultOrder else 'NONE') + ', still GT-controlled: ' + $isStillGTControlled + ')'

'[GT-AI] PHASE 7: Default order changed from GalaxyTraderMK3 to ' + (if $currentDefaultOrder then $currentDefaultOrder else 'NONE') + ' BUT ship still GT-controlled via commander - NOT sending cancellation'

param.name: reason
param.value: 'GT order cancelled - restoring original name'

param.name: validOrderIds
param.value: ['GalaxyTraderMK3', 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2']

do_if.value: this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] PHASE 6 DEBUG: ' + this.ship.idcode + ' - currentCommander: ' + (if @$currentCommander.exists then @$currentCommander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', previousTrackedCommander: ' + (if @$previousTrackedCommander.exists then @$previousTrackedCommander.idcode else 'NONE')

do_if.value: $currentCommander.defaultorder? and ((@$currentCommander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @$currentCommander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') or (@$currentCommander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $currentCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and (@$currentCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @$currentCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2')))

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] PHASE 6: Commander initialized for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (commander: ' + $currentCommander.idcode + ', has GT: ' + $newCommanderHasGT + ')'

do_elseif.value: ((@$previousTrackedCommander.exists == true) and not (@$currentCommander.exists == true)) or (not (@$previousTrackedCommander.exists == true) and (@$currentCommander.exists == true))

do_if.value: $oldCommander.defaultorder? and ((@$oldCommander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @$oldCommander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') or (@$oldCommander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $oldCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and (@$oldCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @$oldCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2')))

$newCommander.defaultorder? and ((@$newCommander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @$newCommander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') or (@$newCommander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $newCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and (@$newCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @$newCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2')))

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] PHASE 6: Commander change detected for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (old: ' + (if @$oldCommander.exists then @$oldCommander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', new: ' + (if @$newCommander.exists then @$newCommander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', has GT: ' + $newCommanderHasGT + ')'

param.name: reason
param.value: 'Subordinate removed from GT commander - restoring original name'

param.name: validOrderIds
param.value: ['GalaxyTraderMK3', 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2']

do_if.value: $newCommander.defaultorder? and ((@$newCommander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @$newCommander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') or (@$newCommander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $newCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and (@$newCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @$newCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2')))

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] PHASE 6: Commander change detected for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (old: ' + $oldCommander.idcode + ', new: ' + $newCommander.idcode + ', has GT: ' + $newCommanderHasGT + ')'

do_if.value: this.ship.commander and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship and not this.ship.commander.isclass.station

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Re-inheriting settings from commander ' + this.ship.commander.idcode
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Settings re-inherited successfully'

set_value.name: $effectiveMaxTrades
set_value.exact: if this.$effectiveMaxTrades? then this.$effectiveMaxTrades else [1, [3, if $maxTrades? then $maxTrades else 3].min].max

set_value.name: $effectiveBacktrackTolerance
set_value.exact: if this.$effectiveBacktrackTolerance? then this.$effectiveBacktrackTolerance else [0, [5, if $backtrackTolerance? then $backtrackTolerance else 1].min].max

set_value.name: $mk4DedicatedServe
set_value.exact: if this.$mk4DedicatedServe? then this.$mk4DedicatedServe else (if $serveHomeOnly? then $serveHomeOnly else (if $dedicatedServe? then $dedicatedServe else false))

set_value.name: $mk4AllowPlayerSuppliers
set_value.exact: if this.$mk4AllowPlayerSuppliers? then this.$mk4AllowPlayerSuppliers else (if $buyFromPlayer? then $buyFromPlayer else (if $allowPlayerSuppliers? then $allowPlayerSuppliers else true))

set_value.name: $mk4AllowAiSuppliers
set_value.exact: if this.$mk4AllowAiSuppliers? then this.$mk4AllowAiSuppliers else (if $buyFromFaction? then $buyFromFaction else (if $allowAiSuppliers? then $allowAiSuppliers else true))

set_value.name: $mk4AllowResources
set_value.exact: if this.$mk4AllowResources? then this.$mk4AllowResources else (if $allowResources? then $allowResources else true)

set_value.name: $mk4AllowIntermediates
set_value.exact: if this.$mk4AllowIntermediates? then this.$mk4AllowIntermediates else (if $allowIntermediates? then $allowIntermediates else true)

set_value.name: $mk4AllowTradewares
set_value.exact: if this.$mk4AllowTradewares? then this.$mk4AllowTradewares else (if $allowTradewares? then $allowTradewares else true)

set_value.name: $effectiveIgnoreBuildStorage
set_value.exact: if this.$effectiveIgnoreBuildStorage? then this.$effectiveIgnoreBuildStorage else false

set_value.name: $mk42Priorities
set_value.exact: if this.$mk42Priorities? then this.$mk42Priorities else table[$Buildstorage = (if this.$effectivePriorityBuildstorage? then this.$effectivePriorityBuildstorage else 10), $Stations = (if this.$effectivePriorityStations? then this.$effectivePriorityStations else 8), $Aux = (if this.$effectivePriorityAux? then this.$effectivePriorityAux else 0), $Carrier = (if this.$effectivePriorityCarrier? then this.$effectivePriorityCarrier else 0)]

set_value.name: $effectiveIgnoreTradeRules
set_value.exact: if this.$effectiveIgnoreTradeRules? then this.$effectiveIgnoreTradeRules else false

set_value.name: $effectiveIgnoreMK1Supply
set_value.exact: if this.$effectiveIgnoreMK1Supply? then this.$effectiveIgnoreMK1Supply else true

set_value.name: $effectiveIgnoreCarrierAux
set_value.exact: if this.$effectiveIgnoreCarrierAux? then this.$effectiveIgnoreCarrierAux else false

set_value.name: $effectiveIgnoreBuildStorage
set_value.exact: if this.$effectiveIgnoreBuildStorage? then this.$effectiveIgnoreBuildStorage else false

set_value.name: $effectiveUseMinCargoThresholdFilter
set_value.exact: if this.$effectiveUseMinCargoThresholdFilter? then this.$effectiveUseMinCargoThresholdFilter else (if $useMinCargoThreshold? then $useMinCargoThreshold else false)

set_value.name: $effectivePriorityWares
set_value.exact: if this.$effectivePriorityWares? then this.$effectivePriorityWares else (if $prioritywares? then $prioritywares else [])

set_value.name: $effectivePriorityScoreMultiplier
set_value.exact: if this.$effectivePriorityScoreMultiplier? then this.$effectivePriorityScoreMultiplier else (if $priorityscoremultiplier? then $priorityscoremultiplier else 1)

set_value.name: $isCurrentlySubordinate
set_value.exact: this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Reset was_subordinate flag (has direct GT order, not subordinate)'

param.name: threatData
param.value: if this.$destinationThreatData? then this.$destinationThreatData else null

param.name: home
param.value: if this.$effectiveHome? and this.$effectiveHome != null and this.$effectiveHome.exists then this.$effectiveHome else this.ship.sector

param.name: debugchance
param.value: if this.$debugchance? then this.$debugchance else 0

param.name: autoJumpDistanceByLevel
param.value: if $autoJumpDistanceByLevel? then $autoJumpDistanceByLevel else false

do_if.value: global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{this.ship}? and global.$GT_Ships.{this.ship}.$Escaping? and global.$GT_Ships.{this.ship}.$Escaping

set_value.name: $blacklistgroup
set_value.exact: if this.$blacklistgroup? then this.$blacklistgroup else blacklistgroup.civilian

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': === MAIN LOOP STARTED === (Pilot: ' + (if this.ship.pilot then this.ship.pilot.name else 'NONE') + ')'
'[GT-AI] GT order reassigned for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (detected in main loop, old: ' + this.$trackedDefaultOrder + ', new: ' + $currentDefaultOrder + ')'

'[GT-AI] PHASE 7: GT order cancelled for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (detected in main loop, old: ' + this.$trackedDefaultOrder + ', new: ' + (if $currentDefaultOrder then $currentDefaultOrder else 'NONE') + ')'

param.name: reason
param.value: 'GT order cancelled - restoring original name'

param.name: validOrderIds
param.value: ['GalaxyTraderMK3', 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2']

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Training completed - continuing with trading'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Cleared stale training flags (pilot not XP blocked)'

do_if.value: this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship

set_value.name: $oldCommander
set_value.exact: if this.$trackedCommander? then this.$trackedCommander else null

do_if.value: $oldCommander.defaultorder? and ((@$oldCommander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @$oldCommander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') or (@$oldCommander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $oldCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and (@$oldCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @$oldCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2')))

$newCommander.defaultorder? and ((@$newCommander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @$newCommander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') or (@$newCommander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $newCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and (@$newCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @$newCommander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2')))

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] PHASE 6: Commander change detected for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (old: ' + (if @$oldCommander.exists then @$oldCommander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', new: ' + (if @$newCommander.exists then @$newCommander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', has GT: ' + $newCommanderHasGT + ')'

param.name: reason
param.value: 'Commander changed - no longer subordinate to GT commander'

param.name: validOrderIds
param.value: ['GalaxyTraderMK3', 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2']

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] PHASE 6: Subordinate count changed for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (old: ' + $oldSubordinateCount + ', new: ' + $newSubordinateCount + ', was commander: ' + $wasCommander + ', is commander: ' + $isCommander + ')'

set_value.name: this.$was_subordinate
set_value.exact: this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship

do_if.value: not $hasDirectGTOrder and this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship

this.ship.commander.defaultorder? and ((@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') or (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2')))

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': SUBORDINATE ORPHANED: Commander assignment completely removed - restoring ship name and self-aborting'

do_if.value: this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$OriginalShipName?

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Ship = this.ship, $Pilot = this.ship.pilot, $Reason = 'Commander lost GT order', $OriginalName = $originalName ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Self-canceling GT order - commander assignment removed'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': SUBORDINATE ORPHANED: Commander ' + this.ship.commander.idcode + ' no longer has GT order - restoring ship name and self-aborting'

do_if.value: this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$OriginalShipName?

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Ship = this.ship, $Pilot = this.ship.pilot, $Reason = 'Commander lost GT order', $OriginalName = $originalName ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Self-canceling GT order - will follow commander via Assist'

set_value.name: $pilotXPBlocked
set_value.exact: if (global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly) then false else (global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$XPBlocked? or global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$PausedWithTrainingNeeded?)

set_value.name: $pilotMustTrainNow
set_value.exact: if (global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly) then false else ($pilotXPBlocked or ($hardForceTraining and $blockedLevel gt 1))

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': DECISION LOGIC: XPBlocked=' + $pilotXPBlocked + ', MustTrainNow=' + $pilotMustTrainNow + ', HardForce=' + $hardForceTraining + ', ManagementLevel=' + $pilotLevel + ', BlockedLevel=' + $blockedLevel + ', Reason=' + $trainingGateReason + ', Pilot=' + $pilotNameForDebug
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': TRAINING MANDATORY: Pilot ' + $pilotNameForDebug + ' needs Level ' + $blockedLevel + ' training - no trading allowed until training completes'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Pilot marked for training but BlockedLevel is invalid - clearing block and proceeding with trading'

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Ship = this.ship, $Pilot = this.ship.pilot, $Reason = 'Training gate invalid: BlockedLevel lte 1' ]

do_if.value: not (global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly) and ($gt_autotraining or $manualTrainingRequested or $academyEnrollmentPending) and this.ship.pilot and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and $blockedLevel gt 1

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Soft-force/manual mode active - continuing trading but retrying training this loop (blocked level ' + $blockedLevel + ', manual=' + $manualTrainingRequested + ')'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Training gate allows trading - proceeding to maintenance check'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': GT_Trade_Found signal received during maintenance wait - processing from param2 data'

do_if.value: ($gt_autotraining or $manualTrainingRequested or $academyEnrollmentPending) and this.ship.pilot and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Restored in-flight training session after save/load (DockAndTrain=' + $hasActiveTrainingOrder + ', MD timer=' + $mdTrainingInProgress + ')'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Training not in progress - can start training'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': TRAINING INTERRUPTED: Previous training was aborted - restarting automatically'

set_value.name: $mustTrainNow
set_value.exact: if (global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly) then false else (global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$XPBlocked? or global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$PausedWithTrainingNeeded? or ($hardForceTraining and $blockedLevel gt 1))

set_value.name: $shouldRetryTraining
set_value.exact: if (global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly) then false else ($mustTrainNow or ((not $hardForceTraining) and $blockedLevel gt 1) or ($manualTrainingRequested and $blockedLevel gt 1))

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': 🎓 Initiating mandatory training for pilot ' + $pilotNameForDebug + ' (Level ' + $blockedLevel + ', reason=' + $trainingGateReason + ', hardforce=' + $hardForceTraining + ')'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Training signal sent to MD system for pilot ' + $pilotNameForDebug
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Training retry backoff active (' + $retryRemaining + 's remaining)'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Training gate allows trading in mandatory handler (reason=' + $trainingGateReason + ', blockedLevel=' + $blockedLevelForDebug + ', hardforce=' + $hardForceTraining + ')'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': ⏳ Training already in progress (active order: ' + $hasActiveTrainingOrder + ') - waiting'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Auto-training disabled or no pilot data - waiting'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Training station found during wait - proceeding immediately'

param.name: priorityBuildstorage
param.value: if this.$effectivePriorityBuildstorage? then this.$effectivePriorityBuildstorage else (if $priorityBuildstorage? then $priorityBuildstorage else 10)

param.name: priorityStations
param.value: if this.$effectivePriorityStations? then this.$effectivePriorityStations else (if $priorityStations? then $priorityStations else 8)

param.name: priorityAux
param.value: if this.$effectivePriorityAux? then this.$effectivePriorityAux else (if $priorityAux? then $priorityAux else 0)

param.name: priorityCarrier
param.value: if this.$effectivePriorityCarrier? then this.$effectivePriorityCarrier else (if $priorityCarrier? then $priorityCarrier else 0)

param.name: buyFromFaction
param.value: if this.$mk4AllowAiSuppliers? then this.$mk4AllowAiSuppliers else 5

set_value.name: $mk42LogbookEnabled
set_value.exact: if this.$effectiveLogbookEntries? then this.$effectiveLogbookEntries else (if $gt_logbookentries? then $gt_logbookentries else $logbookentries)

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': MK4-2 all delivery-class sliders are 0 — idling (no search)'

set_value.name: $pilotSkillMissing
set_value.exact: this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship and (not this.ship.pilot? or not global.$GT_Pilots? or not global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? or not global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level?)

set_value.name: $pilotSkillMissing
set_value.exact: this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship and (not this.ship.pilot? or not global.$GT_Pilots? or not global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? or not global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level?)

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': ERROR: GT pilot level unavailable after ' + this.$pilotSkillWaitTries + 's - NOT sending trade search request. Will retry on next loop (this is a timing bug we want to SEE).'

set_value.name: $_isSubordinateNow
set_value.exact: this.ship.commander and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship

set_value.name: $_cmdAutoWares
set_value.exact: if $_commanderOrderNow.$autowares? then $_commanderOrderNow.$autowares else (if $_commanderOrderNow.$lockWares? then not $_commanderOrderNow.$lockWares else $effectiveAutoWares)

set_value.name: $_cmdWareBasket
set_value.exact: if $_commanderOrderNow.$warebasket? and $_commanderOrderNow.$warebasket.count gt 0 then $_commanderOrderNow.$warebasket else (if $_commanderOrderNow.$specialWareBasket? then $_commanderOrderNow.$specialWareBasket else $effectiveWareBasket)

set_value.name: $_cmdM4Res
set_value.exact: if $_commanderOrderNow.$allowResources? then $_commanderOrderNow.$allowResources else (if this.$mk4AllowResources? then this.$mk4AllowResources else true)

set_value.name: $_cmdM4Int
set_value.exact: if $_commanderOrderNow.$allowIntermediates? then $_commanderOrderNow.$allowIntermediates else (if this.$mk4AllowIntermediates? then this.$mk4AllowIntermediates else true)

set_value.name: $_cmdM4Tw
set_value.exact: if $_commanderOrderNow.$allowTradewares? then $_commanderOrderNow.$allowTradewares else (if this.$mk4AllowTradewares? then this.$mk4AllowTradewares else true)

set_value.name: $_cmdM4Aps
set_value.exact: if $_commanderOrderNow.$buyFromPlayer? then $_commanderOrderNow.$buyFromPlayer else (if $_commanderOrderNow.$allowPlayerSuppliers? then $_commanderOrderNow.$allowPlayerSuppliers else (if this.$mk4AllowPlayerSuppliers? then this.$mk4AllowPlayerSuppliers else true))

set_value.name: $_cmdM4Aas
set_value.exact: if $_commanderOrderNow.$buyFromFaction? then $_commanderOrderNow.$buyFromFaction else (if $_commanderOrderNow.$allowAiSuppliers? then $_commanderOrderNow.$allowAiSuppliers else (if this.$mk4AllowAiSuppliers? then this.$mk4AllowAiSuppliers else true))

set_value.name: $_cmdM4Ded
set_value.exact: if $_commanderOrderNow.$serveHomeOnly? then $_commanderOrderNow.$serveHomeOnly else (if $_commanderOrderNow.$dedicatedServe? then $_commanderOrderNow.$dedicatedServe else (if this.$mk4DedicatedServe? then this.$mk4DedicatedServe else false))

do_if.value: this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level?

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Commander settings changed (refreshing inherited settings). NewSig=' + $_commanderSettingsSig

set_value.exact: if $mk4PolicyHome? and $mk4PolicyHome.isclass.sector then $mk4PolicyHome else (if $mk4PolicyHome? and $mk4PolicyHome.sector? then @$mk4PolicyHome.sector else null)

do_if.value: $mk4PolicyHomeSector? and $mk4PolicyHomeSector.exists and global.$GT_TradeCacheMK42? and global.$GT_TradeCacheMK42.{$mk4PolicyHomeSector}? and global.$GT_TradeCacheMK42.{$mk4PolicyHomeSector}.count gt 0

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Own order ignoretraderules changed -> ' + $_ownIgnoreTradeRules + ' (refreshing)'

do_if.value: this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship and not this.ship.commander.isclass.station

set_value.name: $mk42PolicyOrder
set_value.exact: if this.ship.defaultorder? then this.ship.defaultorder else null

param.value: if $mk42PolicyOrder.$priorityBuildstorage? then $mk42PolicyOrder.$priorityBuildstorage else (if this.$effectivePriorityBuildstorage? then this.$effectivePriorityBuildstorage else 10)

param.value: if $mk42PolicyOrder.$priorityStations? then $mk42PolicyOrder.$priorityStations else (if this.$effectivePriorityStations? then this.$effectivePriorityStations else 8)

param.value: if $mk42PolicyOrder.$priorityAux? then $mk42PolicyOrder.$priorityAux else (if this.$effectivePriorityAux? then this.$effectivePriorityAux else 0)

param.value: if $mk42PolicyOrder.$priorityCarrier? then $mk42PolicyOrder.$priorityCarrier else (if this.$effectivePriorityCarrier? then this.$effectivePriorityCarrier else 0)

param.value: if $mk42PolicyOrder.$prioritywares? then $mk42PolicyOrder.$prioritywares else (if this.$effectivePriorityWares? then this.$effectivePriorityWares else [])

set_value.name: this.$mk4BuildStorageOnlyMode
set_value.exact: this.$effectivePriorityBuildstorage gt 0 and this.$effectivePriorityStations == 0 and this.$effectivePriorityAux == 0 and this.$effectivePriorityCarrier == 0

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': MK4-2 live-order priorities ' + $mk42PrioSigNow + (if $mk42PrioChangedNow then ' (CHANGED from ' + $mk42PrioSigPrev + ')' else '')

set_value.name: $mk4PolicyHome
set_value.exact: if this.$effectiveHome? then this.$effectiveHome else (if this.ship.defaultorder? and this.ship.defaultorder.$home? then @this.ship.defaultorder.$home else this.ship.sector)

set_value.name: $mk4PolicyHomeSector
set_value.exact: if $mk4PolicyHome? and $mk4PolicyHome.isclass.sector then $mk4PolicyHome else (if $mk4PolicyHome? and $mk4PolicyHome.sector? then @$mk4PolicyHome.sector else null)

do_if.value: this.$pendingSearchParams? and this.$pendingSearchParams != null and typeof this.$pendingSearchParams == datatype.table

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Processing pending GT_Search_Go before new request (phase=' + $pendingPhaseNow + ')'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Ship already has ' + this.ship.tradeorders.count + ' trade orders - waiting for completion'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade order completed early - checking status immediately'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Ship not yet registered - waiting for registration to complete...'

do_while.value: (not global.$GT_Ships? or not global.$GT_Ships.{this.ship}?) and this.$regSpinCount lt 20

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': WARN Registration missing after 10s spin - re-emitting GT_Register_Ship'

do_while.value: (not global.$GT_Ships? or not global.$GT_Ships.{this.ship}?) and this.$regSpinCount lt 10

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': WARN Registration still missing after retry - bouncing to main_loop'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Ship has cargo - finding best buyer using trade search...'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': CARGO DISPOSAL: Sending GT_Find_Sell at age ' + player.age + ' (MaxSell=' + (if this.$effectiveMaxSell? then this.$effectiveMaxSell else (if $jumpDistanceCoverage? then $jumpDistanceCoverage else 1)) + ' jumps)'

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Ship = this.ship, $HomeBase = if this.$effectiveHome? then this.$effectiveHome else (if this.ship.defaultorder and this.ship.defaultorder.$home? then @this.ship.defaultorder.$home else this.ship.sector), $MaxSell = if this.$effectiveMaxSell? then this.$effectiveMaxSell else (if $jumpDistanceCoverage? then $jumpDistanceCoverage else 1), $DistancePenalty = @this.$effectiveDistancePenalty, $FleetCoordination = @this.$effectiveFleetCoordination, $IgnoreCarrierAux = @this.$effectiveIgnoreCarrierAux, $IgnoreBuildStorage = @this.$effectiveIgnoreBuildStorage, $IgnoreTradeRules = @this.$effectiveIgnoreTradeRules, $IgnoreMK1Supply = if this.$effectiveIgnoreMK1Supply? then this.$effectiveIgnoreMK1Supply else true ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Cargo empty - looking for trade opportunities...'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': EARLY MONEY GATE: player money=' + ($earlyMoneyCheck / 100) + ' Cr at or below threshold=' + (this.$minPlayerMoney + 1000) + ' Cr (MinPlayerMoney=' + this.$minPlayerMoney + ' + 1000 buffer) - skipping trade search'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': GLOBAL MONEY CAP CLEARED (solvent): player money=' + ($earlyMoneyCheck / 100) + ' Cr above gate threshold (' + ($moneyGateThreshold / 100) + ' Cr) - resuming fleet trade searches'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Waiting ' + ($signalDelayMs + 5) + 'ms for GT_Trade_Found signal (delay=' + $signalDelayMs + 'ms + 5ms buffer)'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': GT_Trade_Found signal received during pre-request wait - stored ' + (if $intSignalTradeList != null then $intSignalTradeList.count else 0) + ' trades from interrupt payload'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Pre-request wait completed - no signal received, sending new request'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': SENDING GT_Search_Request signal to MD at game time ' + player.age

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Ship = this.ship, $HomeBase = if this.$effectiveHome? then this.$effectiveHome else (if this.ship.defaultorder and this.ship.defaultorder.$home? then @this.ship.defaultorder.$home else this.ship.sector), $MaxBuy = if this.$effectiveMaxBuy? then this.$effectiveMaxBuy else (if $jumpDistanceBuy? then $jumpDistanceBuy else 1), $MaxSell = if this.$effectiveMaxSell? then this.$effectiveMaxSell else (if $jumpDistanceCoverage? then $jumpDistanceCoverage else 1), $CargoTarget = $gt_cargotarget, $WareBasket = $warebasket, $AllowIllegal = $gt_allowillegal, $EnforceRouteIllegalLegality = $gt_enforceRouteIllegalLegality, $FactionPriority = $gt_factionpriority, $IgnoreCarrierAux = @this.$effectiveIgnoreCarrierAux, $IgnoreBuildStorage = @this.$effectiveIgnoreBuildStorage, $DistancePenalty = @this.$effectiveDistancePenalty, $FleetCoordination = @this.$effectiveFleetCoordination, $IgnoreTradeRules = @this.$effectiveIgnoreTradeRules, $IgnoreMK1Supply = if this.$effectiveIgnoreMK1Supply? then this.$effectiveIgnoreMK1Supply else true, $SearchPool = 'mk4_supply_v2', $SearchDepth = if this.$effectiveSearchDepth? then this.$effectiveSearchDepth else 30, $ForceLiveSearch = $requestForceLiveSearch, $LiveSearchPriority = $requestLiveSearchPriority ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': GT_Search_Request signal SENT, now at game time ' + player.age
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Entering wait state for MD response at game time ' + player.age
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': WAIT TIMEOUT: 120s expired without semaphore grant (GT_Search_Go) at game time ' + player.age + ' — cleaning up queue entry and retrying'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Wait interrupt handler ACTIVE at game time ' + player.age

wait.min: if this.$waitForResponseStartedAt? then (if (120s - (player.age - this.$waitForResponseStartedAt)) gt 1ms then (120s - (player.age - this.$waitForResponseStartedAt)) else 1ms) else 120s
wait.max: if this.$waitForResponseStartedAt? then (if (120s - (player.age - this.$waitForResponseStartedAt)) gt 1ms then (120s - (player.age - this.$waitForResponseStartedAt)) else 1ms) else 120s
wait.comment: Wait for MD system response (120s total; interrupted immediately on response)

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': INTERRUPT FIRED: GT_Search_Go received at age ' + player.age + ' - queueing AI search pipeline'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': INTERRUPT FIRED: GT_Trade_Found received at game time ' + player.age
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade found by MD system - proceeding with execution'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': WAIT TIMEOUT after InProgress keepalives (120s) - aborting search and retrying'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': INTERRUPT FIRED: GT_TradeSearch_InProgress received at game time ' + player.age + ' - continuing to wait (no backoff)'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': INTERRUPT FIRED: GT_TradeSearch_Reset received at game time ' + player.age + ' - retrying request immediately (no backoff)'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': INTERRUPT FIRED: GT_No_Trade_Found received at age ' + player.age + ' (reason=' + (if event.param2? then event.param2 else '') + ')'

set_value.name: this.$lastNoTradeReason
set_value.exact: if event.param2? and event.param2 != null then event.param2 else ''

do_if.value: global.$GT_IsolatedTradeActive? and global.$GT_IsolatedTradeActive.{this.ship}? and global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{this.ship}? and global.$GT_Ships.{this.ship}.$Unreachable?

set_value.name: $blacklistgroup
set_value.exact: if this.$blacklistgroup? then this.$blacklistgroup else blacklistgroup.civilian

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': ESCAPE FALLBACK: No trade found while in blacklisted sector (' + @$currentSector.knownname + ') - moving toward home sector'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': RECEIVED GT_No_Trade_Found signal - starting retry logic (cargo disposal: ' + $isCargoDisposal + ')'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': WAIT TIMEOUT: 120s expired without semaphore grant (GT_Search_Go) at game time ' + player.age + ' — cleaning up queue entry and retrying'

set_value.name: $searchParams
set_value.exact: if this.$pendingSearchParams? then this.$pendingSearchParams else null

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Running AI search pipeline (semaphore-granted) at game time ' + player.age

set_value.name: $searchHome
set_value.exact: if $searchParams.$HomeBase? then @$searchParams.$HomeBase else (if this.$effectiveHome? then this.$effectiveHome else (if this.ship.defaultorder and this.ship.defaultorder.$home? then @this.ship.defaultorder.$home else null))

set_value.name: $searchHomeSector
set_value.exact: if $searchParams.$HomeSector? then @$searchParams.$HomeSector else (if $searchHome? and $searchHome.isclass.sector then $searchHome else (if $searchHome? and $searchHome.sector? then @$searchHome.sector else this.ship.sector))

set_value.name: $searchMaxSell
set_value.exact: if $searchParams.$MaxSell? then @$searchParams.$MaxSell else (if this.$effectiveMaxSell? then this.$effectiveMaxSell else (if $jumpDistanceCoverage? then $jumpDistanceCoverage else 1))

set_value.name: $searchMaxBuy
set_value.exact: if $searchParams.$MaxBuy? then @$searchParams.$MaxBuy else (if this.$effectiveMaxBuy? then this.$effectiveMaxBuy else 0)

do_if.value: this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship and not this.ship.commander.isclass.station

set_value.name: $mk42PolicyOrder
set_value.exact: if this.ship.defaultorder? then this.ship.defaultorder else null

param.name: priorityBuildstorage
param.value: if $mk42PolicyOrder? and $mk42PolicyOrder.$priorityBuildstorage? then $mk42PolicyOrder.$priorityBuildstorage else (if this.$effectivePriorityBuildstorage? then this.$effectivePriorityBuildstorage else (if $priorityBuildstorage? then $priorityBuildstorage else 10))

param.name: priorityStations
param.value: if $mk42PolicyOrder? and $mk42PolicyOrder.$priorityStations? then $mk42PolicyOrder.$priorityStations else (if this.$effectivePriorityStations? then this.$effectivePriorityStations else (if $priorityStations? then $priorityStations else 8))

param.name: priorityAux
param.value: if $mk42PolicyOrder? and $mk42PolicyOrder.$priorityAux? then $mk42PolicyOrder.$priorityAux else (if this.$effectivePriorityAux? then this.$effectivePriorityAux else (if $priorityAux? then $priorityAux else 0))

param.name: priorityCarrier
param.value: if $mk42PolicyOrder? and $mk42PolicyOrder.$priorityCarrier? then $mk42PolicyOrder.$priorityCarrier else (if this.$effectivePriorityCarrier? then this.$effectivePriorityCarrier else (if $priorityCarrier? then $priorityCarrier else 0))

param.name: prioritywares
param.value: if $mk42PolicyOrder? and $mk42PolicyOrder.$prioritywares? then $mk42PolicyOrder.$prioritywares else (if $effectivePriorityWares? then $effectivePriorityWares else [])

set_value.exact: if $mk4CfCand.$SellStation? then $mk4CfCand.$SellStation else (if $mk4CfCand.$SellOffer? and $mk4CfCand.$SellOffer.owner? then $mk4CfCand.$SellOffer.owner else null)
