set_value.exact: if $mk4CfCand.$Ware? then $mk4CfCand.$Ware else (if $mk4CfCand.$SellOffer? and $mk4CfCand.$SellOffer.ware? then $mk4CfCand.$SellOffer.ware else null)

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Completion-first reorder: ' + $mk4CompletionFirstTrades.count + ' single-trip player deliveries moved before ' + $mk4CompletionRestTrades.count + ' other trades (smallest deficit first)'

set_value.name: $validatedCandidateLimit
set_value.exact: if this.$effectiveMaxTrades? and this.$effectiveMaxTrades gt 0 then this.$effectiveMaxTrades else 1

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Validating SELL-ONLY trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ': ' + (if $currentTrade.$Ware? then @$currentTrade.$Ware.name else 'Unknown') + ' (Ship cargo → ' + (if $sellStation? then @$sellStation.knownname else 'Unknown') + ')'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' DOCKING DENIED:' + '
 Station: ' + @$deniedStation.knownname + '
 Sector: ' + @$deniedStation.sector.knownname + '
 Type: ' + $deniedType + '
 Reason: No compatible trading dock for ship size ' + this.ship.docksize + '
 → Trying next trade in list...'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': [CACHE-DETAIL] DockingDenied trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + '
 DeniedType: ' + $deniedType + '
 CanDock BUY=' + $dockAllowedBuyText + ' SELL=' + $dockAllowedSellText + '
 ShipDocksize: ' + this.ship.docksize + '
 SellOfferId: ' + (if $sellOfferId? and $sellOfferId != null then $sellOfferId else 'null') + '
 find_dockingbay(trading) on denied station: ' + (if $cacheDeniedDockFound then 'YES' else 'NO')

set_value.name: $blacklistgroup
set_value.exact: if this.$blacklistgroup? then this.$blacklistgroup else blacklistgroup.civilian

debug_text.text:
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': PATH check (blacklist-aware):' + '
 Current sector: ' + @$currentSector.knownname + '
 BUY: ' + $buyStationNameForDebug + ' (Sector: ' + $buySectorNameForDebug + ', Distance: ' + $buyDistance + ')' + '
 SELL: ' + @$sellStation.knownname + ' (Sector: ' + @$sellStation.sector.knownname + ', Distance: ' + $sellDistance + ')' + '
 Blacklist group: ' + $blacklistgroup + '
 Result: ' + (if ($buyDistance lt 0 and not $isSellOnlyTrade) or $sellDistance lt 0 then 'BLOCKED' else 'OK')

set_value.name: $unreachableStation
set_value.exact: if ($buyDistance lt 0 and not $isSellOnlyTrade) then $buyStation else $sellStation

set_value.name: $unreachableType
set_value.exact: if ($buyDistance lt 0 and not $isSellOnlyTrade) then 'BUY' else 'SELL'

debug_text.text:
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdx + '/' + (if $tradeList != null then $tradeList.count else 0) + ' PATH BLOCKED:' + '
 Station: ' + @$unreachableStation.knownname + '
 Type: ' + $unreachableType + '
 Reason: No path exists (disconnected sectors, war, or gates destroyed)' + '
 → Trying next trade in list...'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + (if $tradeIdx? then $tradeIdx else 0) + ' MISSING SELL STATION (sell-only trade requires sellStation)'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Validating trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ': ' + (if $currentTrade.$BuyOffer? then @$currentTrade.$BuyOffer.ware.name else 'Unknown') + ' (' + (if $buyStation? then @$buyStation.knownname else 'Unknown') + ' → ' + (if $sellStation? then @$sellStation.knownname else 'Unknown') + ')'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade REJECTED — delivery class ' + (if $valDelivCls.$Class? then $valDelivCls.$Class else 'None') + ' is disabled (priority 0): ' + @$sellStation.knownname

set_value.name: $valMk4AISupLive
set_value.exact: if this.$mk4AllowAiSuppliers? then this.$mk4AllowAiSuppliers else true

set_value.name: $valMk4PlSupLive
set_value.exact: if this.$mk4AllowPlayerSuppliers? then this.$mk4AllowPlayerSuppliers else true

debug_text.text:
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' DOCKING DENIED:' + '
 Station: ' + @$deniedStation.knownname + '
 Sector: ' + @$deniedStation.sector.knownname + '
 Type: ' + $deniedType + '
 Reason: No compatible trading dock for ship size ' + this.ship.docksize + '
 → Trying next trade in list...'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': [CACHE-DETAIL] DockingDenied trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + '
 DeniedType: ' + $deniedType + '
 CanDock BUY=' + $dockAllowedBuyText + ' SELL=' + $dockAllowedSellText + '
 ShipDocksize: ' + this.ship.docksize + '
 BuyOfferId: ' + (if $buyOfferId? and $buyOfferId != null then $buyOfferId else 'null') + '
 SellOfferId: ' + (if $sellOfferId? and $sellOfferId != null then $sellOfferId else 'null') + '
 find_dockingbay(trading) on denied station: ' + (if $cacheDeniedDockFound then 'YES' else 'NO')

set_value.name: $blacklistgroup
set_value.exact: if this.$blacklistgroup? then this.$blacklistgroup else blacklistgroup.civilian

debug_text.text:
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': PATH check (blacklist-aware):' + '
 Current sector: ' + @$currentSector.knownname + '
 BUY: ' + @$buyStation.knownname + ' (Sector: ' + @$buyStation.sector.knownname + ', Distance: ' + $buyDistance + ')' + '
 SELL: ' + @$sellStation.knownname + ' (Sector: ' + @$sellStation.sector.knownname + ', Distance: ' + $sellDistance + ')' + '
 Blacklist group: ' + $blacklistgroup + '
 Result: ' + (if $buyDistance lt 0 or $sellDistance lt 0 then 'BLOCKED' else 'OK')

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdx + '/' + (if $tradeList != null then $tradeList.count else 0) + ' PATH BLOCKED:' + '
 Station: ' + @$unreachableStation.knownname + '
 Type: ' + $unreachableType + '
 Reason: No path exists (disconnected sectors, war, or gates destroyed)' + '
 → Trying next trade in list...'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + (if $tradeIdx? then $tradeIdx else 0) + ' MISSING STATIONS (normal trade requires both buy and sell stations)'
'[GT-AI-ERROR] Home sector not found for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' - effectiveHome and defaultorder.$home are null! This should never happen.'
'[GT-AI-ERROR] Failed to extract home sector from homeBase for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' - using ship.sector as emergency fallback (THIS WILL CAUSE DRIFT!)'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': HOME SECTOR distance check (trade ' + $tradeIdx + '):' + '
 Home sector: ' + @$homeSector.knownname + '
 BUY station: ' + $buyStationNameForDebug + ' (Sector: ' + $buySectorNameForDebug + ', Distance from home: ' + $buyDistanceFromHome + '/' + $_maxBuy + ' jumps)' + '
 SELL station: ' + @$sellStation.knownname + ' (Sector: ' + @$sellStation.sector.knownname + ', Distance from home: ' + $sellDistanceFromHome + '/' + $_maxSell + ' jumps)' + '
 Ship position: ' + @this.ship.sector.knownname + '
 Validation: ' + (if ($buyDistanceFromHome lt 0 or $sellDistanceFromHome lt 0 or ($buyDistanceFromHome gt $_maxBuy and not $isSellOnlyTrade) or $sellDistanceFromHome gt $_maxSell) then 'REJECTED' else 'PASSED')

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdx + '/' + (if $tradeList != null then $tradeList.count else 0) + ' DISTANCE EXCEEDED:' + '
 BUY: ' + $buyStationNameForDebug + ' (Sector: ' + $buySectorNameForDebug + ', Distance from home: ' + $buyDistanceFromHome + '/' + $_maxBuy + ' jumps)' + '
 SELL: ' + @$sellStation.knownname + ' (Sector: ' + @$sellStation.sector.knownname + ', Distance from home: ' + $sellDistanceFromHome + '/' + $_maxSell + ' jumps)' + '
 Home sector: ' + @$homeSector.knownname + '
 Ship position: ' + @this.ship.sector.knownname + '
 Reason: Station(s) exceed maximum distance from home sector' + '
 → Trying next trade in list...'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': BUY blacklist check:' + '
 Current sector: ' + @$currentSector.knownname + ' (blacklisted: ' + $currentSectorIsBlacklisted + ')' + '
 Station: ' + $buyStationNameForDebug + '
 Sector: ' + $buySectorNameForDebug + '
 Station (objectactivity): ' + $buyStationBlacklisted + '
 Sector (sectoractivity): ' + $buySectorActivityBlacklisted + '
 Sector (sectortravel): ' + $buySectorTravelBlacklisted + '
 Ship in buy sector: ' + ($buySector == $currentSector) + '
 Final result: ' + $buyBlacklisted

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': SELL blacklist check:' + '
 Current sector: ' + @$currentSector.knownname + ' (blacklisted: ' + $currentSectorIsBlacklisted + ')' + '
 Station: ' + @$sellStation.knownname + '
 Sector: ' + @$sellStation.sector.knownname + '
 Station (objectactivity): ' + $sellStationBlacklisted + '
 Sector (sectoractivity): ' + $sellSectorActivityBlacklisted + '
 Sector (sectortravel): ' + $sellSectorTravelBlacklisted + '
 Ship in sell sector: ' + ($sellSector == $currentSector) + '
 Final result: ' + $sellBlacklisted

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Intra-sector trade BLOCKED (escape required):' + '
 Current sector: ' + @$currentSector.knownname + ' (BLACKLISTED)' + '
 Buy/Sell: Both in ' + @$currentSector.knownname + '
 Reason: Ship must escape from blacklisted sector'

do_if.value: not $buyBlacklisted and not $sellBlacklisted and $effectiveIgnoreMK1Supply? and $effectiveIgnoreMK1Supply and global.$GT_MK1SuppliedStations?

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade REJECTED — buy station ' + @$buyStation.knownname + ' is MK1-supplied'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade REJECTED — sell station ' + @$sellStation.knownname + ' is MK1-supplied'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdx + '/' + (if $tradeList != null then $tradeList.count else 0) + ' BLACKLISTED:' + '
 Station: ' + @$blacklistedStation.knownname + '
 Sector: ' + @$blacklistedStation.sector.knownname + '
 Type: ' + $tradeType + '
 Reason: ' + $blacklistReason + '
 → Trying next trade in list...'

do_if.value: $resData.$Until? and player.age lt @$resData.$Until and $resData.$Ship? and @$resData.$Ship != this.ship

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdx + '/' + (if $tradeList != null then $tradeList.count else 0) + ' RESERVED by ' + @$resData.$Ship.idcode + ' (expires in ' + (@$resData.$Until - player.age) + ') - skipping'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdx + '/' + (if $tradeList != null then $tradeList.count else 0) + ' INCOMPATIBLE CARGO TYPE:' + '
 Ware: ' + @$ware.name + '
 Reason: Ship does not have required cargo bay type (e.g., liquid/gas requires special containment)' + '
 Ship cargo max for this ware: ' + this.ship.cargo.{$ware}.max + '
 → Trying next trade in list...'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' passed validation - checking offer availability...'

'[GT-Reserve] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': pre-validate SELL-ONLY' + '
 needed=' + $currentTrade.$Amount + '
 sell offeramount(ship)=' + (if $sellOfferAmount? then $sellOfferAmount else 'null') + '
 sell desiredamount=' + (if $sellDesiredBefore? then $sellDesiredBefore else 'null')

do_if.value: (not $preValSellStation? or not @$preValSellStation.exists) and $currentTrade.$SellStationBase? and @$currentTrade.$SellStationBase.exists and @$currentTrade.$SellStationBase.buildstorage and @$currentTrade.$SellStationBase.buildstorage.exists

set_value.name: $preValForceBsRescan
set_value.exact: (not $preValSellStation? or not @$preValSellStation.exists) or (@$preValSellStation.exists and @$preValSellStation.isclass.buildstorage) or ($currentTrade.$SellStationBase? and @$currentTrade.$SellStationBase.exists and $currentTrade.$SellStationBase.buildstorage?)

do_if.value: not $preValForceBsRescan and $preValSellStation? and $preValSellStation.exists and $preValSellWare != null and not @$preValSellStation.isclass.buildstorage

debug_text.text:
'[GT-Reserve] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': BS re-resolve' + '
 ware=' + (if $preValSellWare? then $preValSellWare.name else 'null') + '
 deliveryId=' + (if $currentTrade.$DeliveryStationId? then $currentTrade.$DeliveryStationId else 'null') + '
 bsBuyer found=' + (if $preValBsBuyer? and @$preValBsBuyer.exists then 1 else 0) + '
 sellOffer.buyer alive=' + (if $currentTrade.$SellOffer.buyer? and @$currentTrade.$SellOffer.buyer.exists then 1 else 0) + '
 sellOffer.owner alive=' + (if $currentTrade.$SellOffer.owner? and @$currentTrade.$SellOffer.owner.exists then 1 else 0)

'[GT-Reserve] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': pre-validate NORMAL' + '
 needed=' + $currentTrade.$Amount + '
 buy offeramount(ship)=' + (if $buyOfferAmount? then $buyOfferAmount else 'null') + '
 buy desiredamount=' + (if $buyDesiredBefore? then $buyDesiredBefore else 'null') + '
 sell offeramount(ship)=' + (if $sellOfferAmount? then $sellOfferAmount else 'null') + '
 sell desiredamount=' + (if $sellDesiredBefore? then $sellDesiredBefore else 'null')

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' offer became invalid:' + '
 Trade type: ' + (if $isSellOnlyTrade then 'SELL-ONLY' else 'NORMAL') + '
 Buy offer: ' + (if $isSellOnlyTrade then 'N/A' else (if $buyOfferAvailable? then ('available=' + $buyOfferAvailable + ', amount=' + (if $buyOfferAmount? then $buyOfferAmount else 'null') + ' (needed: ' + $currentTrade.$Amount + ')') else 'MISSING')) + '
 Sell offer: available=' + (if $sellOfferAvailable? then $sellOfferAvailable else 'null') + ', amount=' + (if $sellOfferAmount? then $sellOfferAmount else 'null') + ' (needed: ' + $currentTrade.$Amount + ')' + '
 Failure: ' + $offerInvalidReason + '
 Reason: offer unavailable or amount is 0/null (clamping would handle partial amounts, but offer is completely unavailable)' + '
 → Trying next trade in list...'

set_value.name: $wareName
set_value.exact: if $currentTrade.$BuyOffer? and $currentTrade.$BuyOffer.ware? then @$currentTrade.$BuyOffer.ware.name else (if $currentTrade.$SellOffer? and $currentTrade.$SellOffer.ware? then @$currentTrade.$SellOffer.ware.name else 'NULL')

debug_text.text:
'[GT-AI-PROFIT] (' + this.ship.idcode + ') AMOUNT CLAMPING START:' + '
 Ware: ' + $wareName + '
 Original Amount (from trade object): ' + $currentTrade.$Amount + ' units' + '
 Trade Profit (RAW): ' + (if $currentTrade.$Profit? then $currentTrade.$Profit else 'NULL') + ' = ' + (if $currentTrade.$Profit? then ($currentTrade.$Profit/100) + ' Cr' else 'NULL') + '
 Trade BuyPrice (RAW): ' + (if $currentTrade.$BuyPrice? then $currentTrade.$BuyPrice else 'NULL') + ' = ' + (if $currentTrade.$BuyPrice? then ($currentTrade.$BuyPrice/100) + ' Cr' else 'NULL') + '
 Trade SellPrice (RAW): ' + (if $currentTrade.$SellPrice? then $currentTrade.$SellPrice else 'NULL') + ' = ' + (if $currentTrade.$SellPrice? then ($currentTrade.$SellPrice/100) + ' Cr' else 'NULL')

'[GT-Reserve] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': post-clamp BUY' + '
 original=' + $currentTrade.$Amount + '
 clamped=' + $finalBuyAmount + '
 buy offeramount(ship)=' + (if $buyOfferAmountAfterClamp? then $buyOfferAmountAfterClamp else 'null') + '
 buy desiredamount=' + (if $buyDesiredAfterClamp? then $buyDesiredAfterClamp else 'null') + '
 clampReason=' + (if $buyClampReason? then $buyClampReason else 'null')

set_value.name: $amountStatus
set_value.exact: if not $finalBuyAmount? then 'null' else if $finalBuyAmount lt 0 then 'negative (' + $finalBuyAmount + ')' else 'zero'

debug_text.text:
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' buy amount clamped to invalid value:' + '
 Original amount: ' + $currentTrade.$Amount + '
 Clamped amount: ' + $amountStatus + '
 Clamp reason: ' + $clampReasonText + '
 Reason: ' + (if $buyClampReason == 'buyer_cargo' then 'Insufficient cargo space' else if $buyClampReason == 'buyer_money' then 'Insufficient funds' else if $buyClampReason == 'seller_cargo' then 'Seller has insufficient stock' else 'Offer constraints') + '
 → Trying next trade in list...'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' buy amount adjusted:' + '
 Original: ' + $currentTrade.$Amount + '
 Clamped: ' + $finalBuyAmount + '
 Reason: ' + $clampReasonText

'[GT-Reserve] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': post-clamp SELL' + '
 original=' + $currentTrade.$Amount + '
 clamped=' + $finalSellAmount + '
 sell offeramount(ship)=' + (if $sellOfferAmountAfterClamp? then $sellOfferAmountAfterClamp else 'null') + '
 sell desiredamount=' + (if $sellDesiredAfterClamp? then $sellDesiredAfterClamp else 'null') + '
 clampReason=' + (if $sellClampReason? then $sellClampReason else 'null')

set_value.name: $amountStatus
set_value.exact: if not $finalSellAmount? then 'null' else if $finalSellAmount lt 0 then 'negative (' + $finalSellAmount + ')' else 'zero'

debug_text.text:
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' sell amount clamped to invalid value:' + '
 Trade type: ' + (if $isSellOnlyTrade then 'SELL-ONLY' else 'NORMAL') + '
 Original amount: ' + $currentTrade.$Amount + '
 Clamped amount: ' + $amountStatus + '
 Clamp reason: ' + $clampReasonText + '
 Reason: ' + (if $sellClampReason == 'buyer_cargo' then 'Buyer has insufficient cargo space' else if $sellClampReason == 'buyer_money' then 'Buyer has insufficient funds' else if $sellClampReason == 'seller_cargo' then 'Ship has insufficient cargo' else 'Offer constraints') + '
 → Trying next trade in list...'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' sell amount adjusted:' + '
 Trade type: ' + (if $isSellOnlyTrade then 'SELL-ONLY' else 'NORMAL') + '
 Original: ' + $currentTrade.$Amount + '
 Clamped: ' + $finalSellAmount + '
 Reason: ' + $clampReasonText

set_value.name: $wareName
set_value.exact: if $currentTrade.$BuyOffer? and $currentTrade.$BuyOffer.ware? then @$currentTrade.$BuyOffer.ware.name else (if $currentTrade.$SellOffer? and $currentTrade.$SellOffer.ware? then @$currentTrade.$SellOffer.ware.name else 'NULL')

debug_text.text:
'[GT-AI-PROFIT] (' + this.ship.idcode + ') AMOUNT SYNCING:' + '
 Ware: ' + $wareName + '
 Original Amount: ' + $currentTrade.$Amount + ' units' + '
 Clamped Buy Amount: ' + $finalBuyAmount + ' units' + '
 Clamped Sell Amount: ' + $finalSellAmount + ' units' + '
 Final Amount (min): ' + $finalAmount + ' units' + '
 Amount changed: ' + (if $finalAmount != $currentTrade.$Amount then 'YES (was ' + $currentTrade.$Amount + ', now ' + $finalAmount + ')' else 'NO') + '
 Trade Profit (unchanged): ' + (if $currentTrade.$Profit? then ($currentTrade.$Profit/100) + ' Cr' else 'NULL')

set_value.name: $mk4ApplyMinCargoUtilFilter
set_value.exact: if $gt_useMinCargoThreshold? then $gt_useMinCargoThreshold else (if this.$effectiveUseMinCargoThresholdFilter? then this.$effectiveUseMinCargoThresholdFilter else false)

set_value.name: $applyMinCargoUtilFilter
set_value.exact: not $isSellOnlyTrade and not $isIsolatedForCargoFilter and $mk4ApplyMinCargoUtilFilter and ($searchMethod == 'cache' or $searchMethod == 'live' or $searchMethod == 'live_fallback')

debug_text.text:
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' rejected by minimum cargo utilization filter:' + '
 Threshold: ' + $cargoUtilThresholdPct + '%' + '
 Actual: ' + $cargoUtilizationPct + '%' + '
 Amount: ' + $finalBuyAmount + '
 Volume/unit: ' + $utilVolumePerUnit + '
 Trade volume: ' + $tradeCargoVolume + ' / Capacity: ' + $shipCargoCapacityVol + '
 Search method: ' + $searchMethod + '
 Isolated mode: ' + $isIsolatedForCargoFilter + '
 → Trying next trade in list...'

set_value.name: $wareName
set_value.exact: if $currentTrade.$BuyOffer? and $currentTrade.$BuyOffer.ware? then @$currentTrade.$BuyOffer.ware.name else (if $currentTrade.$SellOffer? and $currentTrade.$SellOffer.ware? then @$currentTrade.$SellOffer.ware.name else 'NULL')

debug_text.text:
'[GT-AI-PROFIT] (' + this.ship.idcode + ') PROFIT RECALCULATION (ALWAYS):' + '
 Ware: ' + $wareName + '
 Price Source: ' + $priceSource + '
 Amount Changed: ' + $amountStatus + '
 Original Amount: ' + $originalAmount + ' units' + '
 Final Amount: ' + $finalAmountForProfit + ' units' + '
 Original Profit (cached): ' + ($originalProfitRAW/100) + ' Cr (RAW: ' + $originalProfitRAW + ')' + '
 Recalculated Profit (validated): ' + ($recalculatedProfitRAW/100) + ' Cr (RAW: ' + $recalculatedProfitRAW + ')' + '
 Buy Price: ' + ($buyPriceForRecalc/100) + ' Cr (RAW: ' + $buyPriceForRecalc + ')' + '
 Sell Price: ' + ($sellPriceForRecalc/100) + ' Cr (RAW: ' + $sellPriceForRecalc + ')' + '
 Verification: (' + ($sellPriceForRecalc/100) + ' - ' + ($buyPriceForRecalc/100) + ') * ' + $finalAmountForProfit + ' = ' + (($sellPriceForRecalc - $buyPriceForRecalc) * $finalAmountForProfit / 100) + ' Cr'

set_value.name: $wareName
set_value.exact: if $currentTrade.$BuyOffer? and $currentTrade.$BuyOffer.ware? then @$currentTrade.$BuyOffer.ware.name else (if $currentTrade.$SellOffer? and $currentTrade.$SellOffer.ware? then @$currentTrade.$SellOffer.ware.name else 'NULL')

debug_text.text:
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' REJECTED: Cannot validate profit' + '
 Ware: ' + $wareName + '
 Reason: Prices missing from trade object and offers, cannot recalculate/validate profit' + '
 → Trying next trade in list...'

set_value.name: $wareName
set_value.exact: if $currentTrade.$BuyOffer? and $currentTrade.$BuyOffer.ware? then @$currentTrade.$BuyOffer.ware.name else (if $currentTrade.$SellOffer? and $currentTrade.$SellOffer.ware? then @$currentTrade.$SellOffer.ware.name else 'NULL')

debug_text.text:
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' REJECTED: Profit validation failed' + '
 Ware: ' + $wareName + '
 Final Profit (recalculated): ' + $profitStatus + '
 Reason: MK4 price-cap exceeded (supplier price greater than customer buy price)' + '
 → Trying next trade in list...'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' Final docking check FAILED (buy station): ' + @$buyStation.knownname + '
 Sector: ' + @$buyStation.sector.knownname + '
 Reason: No compatible trading dock for ship size ' + this.ship.docksize + '
 → Trying next trade in list...'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' Final docking check FAILED (sell station): ' + @$sellStation.knownname + '
 Sector: ' + @$sellStation.sector.knownname + '
 Reason: No compatible trading dock for ship size ' + this.ship.docksize + '
 → Trying next trade in list...'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' rejected by buildstorage restriction (buy=' + $_buyIsBuildStorage + ', sell=' + $_sellIsBuildStorage + ') → Trying next trade...'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' rejected by carrier/aux restriction → Trying next trade...'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' rejected by MK3 faction blacklist (' + $_mk3BlockedSide + ' faction): ' + (if $_mk3BlockedFaction? then $_mk3BlockedFaction.name else 'Unknown') + ' → Trying next trade...'

do_if.value: not (if this.$effectiveIgnoreTradeRules? then this.$effectiveIgnoreTradeRules else false) and not $isSellOnlyTrade
not $_tradeRuleBlocked and $currentTrade.$BuyOffer? and $sellStation? and $sellStation.exists and not $currentTrade.$BuyOffer.cantradewith.{$sellStation}

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' rejected by trade rules (' + $_tradeRuleReason + ') → Trying next trade...'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' is VALID - selected as primary candidate'

set_value.name: global.$GT_Reservations.{$currentTrade.$SellOffer}
set_value.exact: table[ $Ship = this.ship, $Until = player.age + 10s, $Amount = if $finalSellAmount? and $finalSellAmount gt 0 then $finalSellAmount else (if $pendingTrade.$Amount? and $pendingTrade.$Amount gt 0 then $pendingTrade.$Amount else 1) ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Fleet reservation CREATED (TTL=10s, key=SellOffer)'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + $tradeIdxSafe + '/' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' is VALID - kept as fallback candidate (primary already selected)'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade ' + (if $tradeIdx? then $tradeIdx else 0) + ' SKIPPED: Could not extract ware from trade data'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade SKIPPED: Trade data is null'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade list is empty or null - no trades to validate'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Validation PASSED - creating trade orders (checked ' + $tradesChecked + ' trades, valid=' + $validTradesFound + ', fallbackWindow=' + $validatedTradeCandidates.count + '/' + $validatedCandidateLimit + ', ' + $tradesRejectedPath + ' unreachable, ' + $tradesRejectedDocking + ' docking denied, ' + $tradesRejectedDistance + ' distance exceeded, ' + $tradesRejectedCargo + ' insufficient cargo, ' + $tradesBlacklisted + ' blacklisted, ' + $tradesRejectedRestriction + ' restriction blocked)'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Updated pending trade entry for failure tracking:' + '
 Buy: ' + $buyStationNameForDebug + '
 Sell: ' + $sellStationNameForDebug + '
 Ware: ' + $wareNameForDebug

do_if.value: this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander.defaultorder? and ((@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') or (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2')))

set_value.name: $finalBuyStation
set_value.exact: if $pendingTrade.$BuyStation? then $pendingTrade.$BuyStation else (if $pendingTrade.$BuyOffer.owner? then @$pendingTrade.$BuyOffer.owner else null)

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': FINAL VALIDATION FAILED - Buy offer invalid (trade rules?) - station: ' + @$finalBuyStation.knownname + ', ware: ' + @$finalBuyWare.name

set_value.name: $finalSellStation
set_value.exact: if $pendingTrade.$SellStation? and @$pendingTrade.$SellStation.exists then $pendingTrade.$SellStation else (if $pendingTrade.$SellOffer.buyer? and @$pendingTrade.$SellOffer.buyer.exists then @$pendingTrade.$SellOffer.buyer else (if $pendingTrade.$SellOffer.owner? and @$pendingTrade.$SellOffer.owner.exists then @$pendingTrade.$SellOffer.owner else null))

set_value.name: $finalSellWare
set_value.exact: if $pendingTrade.$SellOffer.ware? then @$pendingTrade.$SellOffer.ware else (if $pendingTrade.$Ware? then $pendingTrade.$Ware else null)

do_if.value: (not $finalSellStation? or not @$finalSellStation.exists) and $pendingTrade.$SellStationBase? and @$pendingTrade.$SellStationBase.exists and @$pendingTrade.$SellStationBase.buildstorage and @$pendingTrade.$SellStationBase.buildstorage.exists

set_value.name: $finalForceBsRescan
set_value.exact: (not $finalSellStation? or not @$finalSellStation.exists) or (@$finalSellStation.exists and @$finalSellStation.isclass.buildstorage) or ($pendingTrade.$SellStationBase? and @$pendingTrade.$SellStationBase.exists and $pendingTrade.$SellStationBase.buildstorage?)

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': FINAL VALIDATION FAILED - Sell offer invalid (trade rules?) - station: ' + @$finalSellStation.knownname + ', ware: ' + @$finalSellWare.name
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': FINAL MK3 blacklist block (buy faction): ' + $finalBuyFaction.name
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': FINAL MK3 blacklist block (sell faction): ' + $finalSellFaction.name

set_value.name: $finalRouteWare
set_value.exact: if $pendingTrade.$Ware? then $pendingTrade.$Ware else (if $pendingTrade.$BuyOffer? and $pendingTrade.$BuyOffer.ware? then @$pendingTrade.$BuyOffer.ware else (if $pendingTrade.$SellOffer? and $pendingTrade.$SellOffer.ware? then @$pendingTrade.$SellOffer.ware else null))

param.name: blacklistGroup
param.value: if this.$blacklistgroup? then this.$blacklistgroup else blacklistgroup.civilian

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': FINAL ILLEGAL ROUTE BLOCK: route changed or sector legality mismatch before order creation'

do_if.value: not $finalBuyOfferValid or not $finalSellOfferValid or not $finalMK3BlacklistValid or not $finalRouteIllegalValid

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': FINAL VALIDATION FAILED - safety check blocked trade immediately before order creation'

'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Retrying validation with remaining candidates after final validation failure (remaining=' + $remainingTrades.count + ', source=' + (if $validatedTradeCandidates? and $validatedTradeCandidates.count gt 1 then 'prevalidated_window' else 'raw_trade_list') + ')'

set_value.name: $mk4UseMinCargoThresholdForRoute
set_value.exact: if $gt_useMinCargoThreshold? then $gt_useMinCargoThreshold else (if this.$effectiveUseMinCargoThresholdFilter? then this.$effectiveUseMinCargoThresholdFilter else false)

set_value.name: $mk4ThresholdPctForSingle
set_value.exact: [10,[(if $gt_cargotarget? then $gt_cargotarget else (if this.$effectiveCargoTarget? then this.$effectiveCargoTarget else 10)),100].min].max

set_value.name: $stBuyPrice
set_value.exact: if not $stIsSellOnly and $stTrade.$BuyOffer? and $stTrade.$BuyOffer.unitprice? then $stTrade.$BuyOffer.unitprice else 0

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': MK4 single-trade preference applied: fill=' + $mk4SingleThresholdFillPct + '% threshold=' + $mk4ThresholdPctForSingle + '% (multitrade deferred)'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': MK4 sell-only single-leg enforced (clearance — multitrade deferred)'

set_value.name: $pBuyPrice
set_value.exact: if not $pIsSellOnly and $mk4PrimaryTrade.$BuyOffer? and $mk4PrimaryTrade.$BuyOffer.unitprice? then $mk4PrimaryTrade.$BuyOffer.unitprice else 0

do_if.value: not $mk4PrimaryBudgetBlocked and not $pIsSellOnly and $pPairAmount gt 0 and $mk4PrimaryTrade.$BuyOffer?

set_value.name: $pSupWare
set_value.exact: if $mk4PrimaryTrade.$Ware? then $mk4PrimaryTrade.$Ware else (if $pSupBuyOffer.ware? then @$pSupBuyOffer.ware else null)

do_if.value: not $mk4PrimaryBudgetBlocked and not $mk4SinglePreferred and $mk4PreparedCandidates.count gt 1 and $mk4QueueableTrades.count gt 0

do_while.value: $mk4QueueableTrades.count lt $validatedCandidateLimit and $mk4RemainingVolume gt 0 and ((not $mk4UseMinCargoThresholdForRoute) or ($mk4CurrentFillPct lt $mk4ThresholdPctForSingle))

set_value.name: $scBuySector
set_value.exact: if $scTrade.$BuySector? then $scTrade.$BuySector else (if $scTrade.$BuyStation? then $scTrade.$BuyStation.sector else (if $scTrade.$BuyOffer? and $scTrade.$BuyOffer.owner? then $scTrade.$BuyOffer.owner.sector else null))

set_value.name: $qBuySector
set_value.exact: if $qTrade.$BuySector? then $qTrade.$BuySector else (if $qTrade.$BuyStation? then $qTrade.$BuyStation.sector else (if $qTrade.$BuyOffer? and $qTrade.$BuyOffer.owner? then $qTrade.$BuyOffer.owner.sector else null))

set_value.name: $scSupWare
set_value.exact: if $scTrade.$Ware? then $scTrade.$Ware else (if $scSupBuyOffer.ware? then @$scSupBuyOffer.ware else null)

set_value.name: $scDestStation
set_value.exact: if $scTrade.$SellStation? and @$scTrade.$SellStation.exists then @$scTrade.$SellStation else (if $scTrade.$SellOffer? and $scTrade.$SellOffer.buyer? and @$scTrade.$SellOffer.buyer.exists then @$scTrade.$SellOffer.buyer else (if $scTrade.$SellOffer? and $scTrade.$SellOffer.owner? then @$scTrade.$SellOffer.owner else null))

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': MK4-2 secondary REJECTED (MIN_LEG_VOLUME: feasibleVol=' + $scMaxFeasibleVolume + ' minLeg=' + $mk4MinLegVolume + ' planned=' + $scPairAmount + ' destNeed=' + $scDestNeedRemaining + ')'

set_value.name: $bsBuyPrice
set_value.exact: if not $bsIsSellOnly and $mk4BestSecondaryTrade.$BuyOffer? and $mk4BestSecondaryTrade.$BuyOffer.unitprice? then $mk4BestSecondaryTrade.$BuyOffer.unitprice else 0

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': GLOBAL MONEY CAP SET: player.money=' + (player.money / 100) + ' Cr — cannot afford 1 unit above MinPlayerMoney (' + $mk4QueueMinMoney + ' Cr)'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': multitrade produced no queueable legs (capacity/route, not budget): player.money=' + (player.money / 100) + ' Cr — retrying as no_trade'

set_value.name: $mk4CompactionAnchorSector
set_value.exact: if $mk4QueueableTrades.{1}.$SellStation? then $mk4QueueableTrades.{1}.$SellStation.sector else (if $mk4QueueableTrades.{1}.$SellOffer? and $mk4QueueableTrades.{1}.$SellOffer.owner? then $mk4QueueableTrades.{1}.$SellOffer.owner.sector else null)

set_value.name: $mk4CandidateSellSector
set_value.exact: if $mk4CompactionCandidate.$SellStation? then $mk4CompactionCandidate.$SellStation.sector else (if $mk4CompactionCandidate.$SellOffer? and $mk4CompactionCandidate.$SellOffer.owner? then $mk4CompactionCandidate.$SellOffer.owner.sector else null)

set_value.name: $mk4CompactionAnchorSector
set_value.exact: if $mk4CompactionBestTrade.$SellStation? then $mk4CompactionBestTrade.$SellStation.sector else (if $mk4CompactionBestTrade.$SellOffer? and $mk4CompactionBestTrade.$SellOffer.owner? then $mk4CompactionBestTrade.$SellOffer.owner.sector else $mk4CompactionAnchorSector)

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': MK4 multitrade execution set: queued=' + $mk4QueueableTrades.count + '/' + $mk4QueueSourceCount + ' (maxTrades=' + $validatedCandidateLimit + ', secondaryBudgetSkipped=' + $mk4SecondaryBudgetSkipped + ', destBudgetSkipped=' + $mk4DestBudgetSkipped + ', supBudgetSkipped=' + $mk4SupBudgetSkipped + ', backtrackSkipped=' + $mk4BacktrackSkipped + ', minLegSkipped=' + $mk4MinLegSkipped + ', minLegFloor=' + $mk4MinLegVolume + ', singlePreferred=' + $mk4SinglePreferred + ')'

set_value.name: $mk4rcBuyAmt
set_value.exact: if $mk4rcTrade.$QueuedBuyAmount? then $mk4rcTrade.$QueuedBuyAmount else (if $mk4rcTrade.$FinalBuyAmount? then $mk4rcTrade.$FinalBuyAmount else (if $mk4rcTrade.$Amount? then $mk4rcTrade.$Amount else 0))

set_value.name: $mk4rcSellAmt
set_value.exact: if $mk4rcTrade.$QueuedSellAmount? then $mk4rcTrade.$QueuedSellAmount else (if $mk4rcTrade.$FinalSellAmount? then $mk4rcTrade.$FinalSellAmount else (if $mk4rcTrade.$Amount? then $mk4rcTrade.$Amount else 0))

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': MK4 pre-order reclamp dropped leg (buy=' + (if $mk4rcBuyClampReason? then $mk4rcBuyClampReason else 'n/a') + ', sell=' + (if $mk4rcSellClampReason? then $mk4rcSellClampReason else 'n/a') + ')'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': MK4 pre-order reclamp removed all legs — retrying search'

set_value.name: $mk42btBuyAmt
set_value.exact: if $mk42btIsSellOnly then 0 else (if $mk42bt.$QueuedBuyAmount? then $mk42bt.$QueuedBuyAmount else (if $mk42bt.$FinalBuyAmount? then $mk42bt.$FinalBuyAmount else (if $mk42bt.$Amount? then $mk42bt.$Amount else 0)))

set_value.name: $mk42btSellAmt
set_value.exact: if $mk42bt.$QueuedSellAmount? then $mk42bt.$QueuedSellAmount else (if $mk42bt.$FinalSellAmount? then $mk42bt.$FinalSellAmount else (if $mk42bt.$Amount? then $mk42bt.$Amount else 0))

set_value.name: $mk42btWare
set_value.exact: if $mk42bt.$Ware? then $mk42bt.$Ware else (if $mk42bt.$BuyOffer? and $mk42bt.$BuyOffer.ware? then $mk42bt.$BuyOffer.ware else (if $mk42bt.$SellOffer? and $mk42bt.$SellOffer.ware? then $mk42bt.$SellOffer.ware else null))

set_value.name: $mk42btBuyStation
set_value.exact: if $mk42bt.$BuyStation? and $mk42bt.$BuyStation.exists then $mk42bt.$BuyStation else (if $mk42bt.$BuyOffer? and $mk42bt.$BuyOffer.owner? and $mk42bt.$BuyOffer.owner.exists then $mk42bt.$BuyOffer.owner else null)

set_value.name: $mk42btSellStation
set_value.exact: if $mk42bt.$SellStation? and $mk42bt.$SellStation.exists then $mk42bt.$SellStation else (if $mk42bt.$SellOffer? and $mk42bt.$SellOffer.owner? and $mk42bt.$SellOffer.owner.exists then $mk42bt.$SellOffer.owner else null)

set_value.name: $qtBuyPriceRaw
set_value.exact: if $qt.$BuyPrice? then $qt.$BuyPrice else (if $qt.$BuyOffer? and $qt.$BuyOffer.unitprice? then $qt.$BuyOffer.unitprice else 0)

set_value.name: $qtSellPriceRaw
set_value.exact: if $qt.$SellPrice? then $qt.$SellPrice else (if $qt.$SellOffer? and $qt.$SellOffer.unitprice? then $qt.$SellOffer.unitprice else 0)

set_value.name: $mk4BuyStationObj
set_value.exact: if $qt.$BuyStation? and $qt.$BuyStation.exists then $qt.$BuyStation else (if $qt.$BuyOffer? and $qt.$BuyOffer.owner? and $qt.$BuyOffer.owner.exists then $qt.$BuyOffer.owner else null)

set_value.name: $mk4SellStationObj
set_value.exact: if $qt.$SellStation? and $qt.$SellStation.exists then $qt.$SellStation else (if $qt.$SellOffer? and $qt.$SellOffer.owner? and $qt.$SellOffer.owner.exists then $qt.$SellOffer.owner else null)

debug_text.text:
'[GT-Reserve] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': after create_trade_order SELL (phase=SELL, leg ' + $qidx + '/' + $mk4QueueableTrades.count + ')' + '
 orderAmount=' + $qtExecSellAmount + '
 sell offeramount(ship)=' + (if $sellOfferAmountAfterOrder? then $sellOfferAmountAfterOrder else 'null') + '
 sell desiredamount=' + (if $sellDesiredAfterOrder? then $sellDesiredAfterOrder else 'null')

set_value.name: $bsSector
set_value.exact: if $bst.$BuySector? then $bst.$BuySector else (if $bst.$BuyStation? then $bst.$BuyStation.sector else (if $bst.$BuyOffer? and $bst.$BuyOffer.owner? then $bst.$BuyOffer.owner.sector else null))

set_value.name: $bctSector
set_value.exact: if $bct.$BuySector? then $bct.$BuySector else (if $bct.$BuyStation? then $bct.$BuyStation.sector else (if $bct.$BuyOffer? and $bct.$BuyOffer.owner? then $bct.$BuyOffer.owner.sector else null))

set_value.name: $bntSector
set_value.exact: if $bnt.$BuySector? then $bnt.$BuySector else (if $bnt.$BuyStation? then $bnt.$BuyStation.sector else (if $bnt.$BuyOffer? and $bnt.$BuyOffer.owner? then $bnt.$BuyOffer.owner.sector else null))

debug_text.text:
'[GT-Reserve] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': after create_trade_order BUY (phase=BUY, leg ' + $qidx + '/' + $mk4BuyPhaseTrades.count + ')' + '
 orderAmount=' + $qtExecBuyAmount + '
 buy offeramount(ship)=' + (if $buyOfferAmountAfterOrder? then $buyOfferAmountAfterOrder else 'null') + '
 buy desiredamount=' + (if $buyDesiredAfterOrder? then $buyDesiredAfterOrder else 'null')

set_value.name: $atpBuySector
set_value.exact: if not $isSellOnlyTradeForPending and $pendingTrade.$BuyOffer? and $pendingTrade.$BuyOffer.owner? then @$pendingTrade.$BuyOffer.owner.sector else null

set_value.name: global.$GT_Ships.{this.ship}.$ActiveTradePolicy
set_value.exact: table[ $AllowIllegal = $effectiveAllowIllegal, $EnforceRouteIllegalLegality = $effectiveEnforceRouteIllegalLegality, $Ware = $finalRouteWare, $BuySector = $atpBuySector, $SellSector = $atpSellSector, $HomeSector = $searchHomeSector, $RouteStart = this.ship.sector, $Leg = if $isSellOnlyTradeForPending then 'sell' else 'buy', $LogbookEntries = $gt_logbookentries, $SetAt = player.age ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] (' + this.ship.idcode + ') Set [FALLBACK] flag - created trade from live_fallback'
'[GT-AI] (' + this.ship.idcode + ') Cleared [FALLBACK] flag - created trade from ' + (if $searchMethod != '' then $searchMethod else 'unknown source') + ' (not live_fallback)'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Fleet reservation CLEARED (trade orders created, native system active)'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': PHASE 2: State update signal sent (Trade_Order_Created)'

set_value.name: $buyOrderText
set_value.exact: if $isSellOnlyTradeForPending then 'N/A (sell-only - ship already has cargo)' else (if $buyStationForPending? then @$buyStationForPending.knownname + ' → ' + (if $wareForPendingTrade? then @$wareForPendingTrade.name else 'Unknown') + ' (x' + $finalBuyAmount + ')' else 'Unknown')

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade orders created:' + '\n BUY: ' + $buyOrderText + '\n SELL: ' + $sellOrderText

param.name: sellSector
param.value: if $isSellOnlyTradeForPending then null else $sellSector

param.name: leg
param.value: if $isSellOnlyTradeForPending then 'sell' else 'buy'

param.name: blacklistGroup
param.value: if this.$blacklistgroup? then this.$blacklistgroup else blacklistgroup.civilian

debug_text.text:
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': ESCAPE ROUTE LOGBOOK DEBUG:' + '
 Current Sector: ' + $currentSectorName + '
 Buy: ' + $buyStationName + ' (' + $buySectorName + ')' + '
 Sell: ' + $sellStationName + ' (' + $sellSectorName + ')' + '
 Ware: ' + $wareInfo + ' (x' + $escapeAmount + ')' + '
 Profit: ' + ($escapeProfit / 100) + ' Cr'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': ESCAPE ROUTE LOGBOOK MESSAGE:' + '\n' + $escapeMessage
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Escape route logbook entry created'

do_elseif.value: @this.ship.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and (((@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') and @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$logbookentries) or (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') and @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.$logbookentries))

set_value.name: $buyPriceRawCanonical
set_value.exact: if $pendingTrade.$BuyPrice? then $pendingTrade.$BuyPrice else (if $pendingTrade.$BuyOffer? and $pendingTrade.$BuyOffer.unitprice? then $pendingTrade.$BuyOffer.unitprice else 0)

set_value.name: $sellPriceRawCanonical
set_value.exact: if $pendingTrade.$SellPrice? then $pendingTrade.$SellPrice else (if $pendingTrade.$SellOffer? and $pendingTrade.$SellOffer.unitprice? then $pendingTrade.$SellOffer.unitprice else 0)

debug_text.text:
'[GT-AI-UI-DUE] ' + this.ship.idcode + '
 MultiTrade: ' + $isMultiTradeSignal + ' (legs=' + $mk4CycleLegCount + ')' + '
 Amount: ' + $uiLogAmount + '
 BuyOffer.unitprice (RAW): ' + $rawBuyOfferUnitPrice + '
 SellOffer.unitprice (RAW): ' + $rawSellOfferUnitPrice + '
 pendingTrade.BuyPrice (RAW?): ' + $rawPendingTradeBuyPrice + '
 pendingTrade.SellPrice (RAW?): ' + $rawPendingTradeSellPrice + '
 Canonical buy price (RAW): ' + $uiBuyPriceRawForSignal + '
 Canonical sell price (RAW): ' + $sellPriceRawCanonical + '
 MoneyRaw sent: ' + $uiMoneyRawForSignal + ' (' + ($uiMoneyRawForSignal / 100) + ' Cr)' + '
 Profit sent (RAW): ' + $rawPendingTradeProfit + ' (' + ($rawPendingTradeProfit / 100) + ' Cr)' + '
 Expected due sum RAW: ' + $rawSignalSum + ' (' + ($rawSignalSum / 100) + ' Cr)'

set_value.name: $wareName
set_value.exact: if $pendingTrade.$BuyOffer? and $pendingTrade.$BuyOffer.ware? then @$pendingTrade.$BuyOffer.ware.name else (if $pendingTrade.$SellOffer? and $pendingTrade.$SellOffer.ware? then @$pendingTrade.$SellOffer.ware.name else 'NULL')

set_value.name: $buyStationName
set_value.exact: if $pendingTrade.$BuyStation? then @$pendingTrade.$BuyStation.knownname else (if $pendingTrade.$BuyOffer? and $pendingTrade.$BuyOffer.owner? then @$pendingTrade.$BuyOffer.owner.knownname else 'NULL')

set_value.name: $sellStationName
set_value.exact: if $pendingTrade.$SellStation? then @$pendingTrade.$SellStation.knownname else (if $pendingTrade.$SellOffer? and $pendingTrade.$SellOffer.owner? then @$pendingTrade.$SellOffer.owner.knownname else 'NULL')

debug_text.text:
'[GT-AI-PROFIT] (' + this.ship.idcode + ') LOGBOOK ENTRY PREPARATION:' + '
 Ware: ' + $wareName + '
 Buy Station: ' + $buyStationName + ' @ ' + ($buyPrice/100) + ' Cr (RAW: ' + $buyPrice + ')' + '
 Sell Station: ' + $sellStationName + ' @ ' + ($sellPrice/100) + ' Cr (RAW: ' + $sellPrice + ')' + '
 Original Amount (from trade): ' + $originalAmount + ' units' + '
 Final Buy Amount (clamped): ' + $finalBuyAmount + ' units' + '
 Final Sell Amount (clamped): ' + $finalSellAmount + ' units' + '
 Log Amount (used for display): ' + $logAmount + ' units' + '
 Profit (RAW): ' + (if $pendingTrade.$Profit? then $pendingTrade.$Profit else 'NULL') + ' = ' + (if $pendingTrade.$Profit? then ($pendingTrade.$Profit/100) + ' Cr' else 'NULL') + '
 Verification with original amount: (' + ($sellPrice/100) + ' - ' + ($buyPrice/100) + ') * ' + $originalAmount + ' = ' + (if $originalAmount != 'NULL' then (($sellPrice - $buyPrice) * $originalAmount / 100) + ' Cr' else 'N/A') + '
 Verification with log amount: (' + ($sellPrice/100) + ' - ' + ($buyPrice/100) + ') * ' + $logAmount + ' = ' + (($sellPrice - $buyPrice) * $logAmount / 100) + ' Cr'

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Ship = this.ship, $BuyOffer = if $pendingTrade.$BuyOffer? then $pendingTrade.$BuyOffer else null, $SellOffer = if $pendingTrade.$SellOffer? then $pendingTrade.$SellOffer else null, $BuyStation = if $pendingTrade.$BuyStation? and $pendingTrade.$BuyStation.exists then $pendingTrade.$BuyStation else null, $SellStation = if $pendingTrade.$SellStation? and $pendingTrade.$SellStation.exists then $pendingTrade.$SellStation else null, $Amount = $logAmount, $Profit = $logProfitRawForSignal, $BuyPrice = $buyPriceForSignal, $SellPrice = $sellPriceForSignal, $BuyPriceRaw = $buyPriceRawForSignal, $SellPriceRaw = $sellPriceRawForSignal, $MoneyRaw = $logMoneyRawForSignal, $IsSellOnly = $isSellOnlyTradeForPending, $IsMk4Supply = true, $PlayerFreeSupplier = if $pendingTrade.$PlayerFreeSupplier? and $pendingTrade.$PlayerFreeSupplier then true else false, $IsMultiTrade = $isMultiTradeSignal, $MultiTradeLegs = if $isMultiTradeSignal then $mk4MultiTradeLegs else [], $MultiTradeSummaryMax = if $isMultiTradeSignal then 6 else 0, $SearchPipeline = $logSearchPipeline ]

debug_text.text:
'[GT-AI-LOG-SIGNAL] ' + this.ship.idcode + '
 sell-only: ' + $isSellOnlyTradeForPending + ', multitrade: ' + $isMultiTradeSignal + ' (legs=' + $mk4CycleLegCount + '), pipeline: ' + $logSearchPipeline + '
 Amount sent: ' + $logAmount + '
 BuyPrice sent (Cr): ' + $buyPriceForSignal + '
 SellPrice sent (Cr): ' + $sellPriceForSignal + '
 BuyPrice sent (RAW): ' + $buyPriceRawForSignal + '
 SellPrice sent (RAW): ' + $sellPriceRawForSignal + '
 Profit sent (RAW): ' + $logProfitRawForSignal + '
 MoneyRaw sent: ' + $logMoneyRawForSignal + ' (' + ($logMoneyRawForSignal / 100) + ' Cr)' + (if $isMultiTradeSignal then '
 MultiTradeLegs: ' + $mk4MultiTradeLegs.count else '')

set_value.name: $searchSource
set_value.exact: if $searchMethod == 'cache' then 'CACHE' else if $searchMethod == 'live' then 'LIVE' else 'UNKNOWN'

debug_text.text:
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': ALL ' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' trades from ' + $searchSource + ' were rejected:' + '
 Path blocked: ' + $tradesRejectedPathSafe + '
 Docking denied: ' + $tradesRejectedDockingSafe + '
 Offer invalid: ' + $tradesRejectedOfferInvalidSafe + '
 Distance unreachable: ' + $tradesRejectedDistanceSafe + '
 Cargo insufficient: ' + $tradesRejectedCargoSafe + '
 Restriction blocked: ' + $tradesRejectedRestrictionSafe + '
 Demand reserved exhausted: ' + $tradesRejectedDemandReservedSafe + '
 Blacklisted: ' + $tradesBlacklistedSafe + '
 Total rejected: ' + $tradeListCountSafe + (if $searchMethod == 'cache' then '
 Cache exhausted: all ' + $tradeListCountSafe + ' cache candidates failed validation (Restriction=' + $tradesRejectedRestrictionSafe + ', Docking=' + $tradesRejectedDockingSafe + ', OfferInvalid=' + $tradesRejectedOfferInvalidSafe + ', Path=' + $tradesRejectedPathSafe + ', Blacklist=' + $tradesBlacklistedSafe + ')' else '') + ' - entering retry logic'

do_if.value: this.$gtRejectSearchMethod? and this.$gtRejectIsIsolatedMode? and this.$gtRejectIsIsolatedMode and global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{this.ship}? and global.$GT_Ships.{this.ship}.$Unreachable?
this.$gtRejectSearchMethod? and this.$gtRejectIsUnreachableOnly? and this.$gtRejectIsUnreachableOnly and not (this.$gtRejectIsIsolatedMode? and this.$gtRejectIsIsolatedMode)

set_value.name: $urNormalRange
set_value.exact: if this.$effectiveMaxBuy? and this.$effectiveMaxSell? then [this.$effectiveMaxBuy, this.$effectiveMaxSell].max else (if this.$effectiveMaxSell? and this.$effectiveMaxSell gt 0 then this.$effectiveMaxSell else 1)

do_if.value: this.$gtRejectSearchMethod? and this.$gtRejectCargoSafe? and this.$gtRejectTradeListCountSafe? and this.$gtRejectCargoSafe gt 0 and this.$gtRejectCargoSafe == this.$gtRejectTradeListCountSafe

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': ALL trades rejected due to insufficient cargo space - triggering cargo disposal'

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Ship = this.ship, $IgnoreCarrierAux = @this.$effectiveIgnoreCarrierAux, $IgnoreBuildStorage = @this.$effectiveIgnoreBuildStorage, $IgnoreTradeRules = @this.$effectiveIgnoreTradeRules, $IgnoreMK1Supply = if this.$effectiveIgnoreMK1Supply? then this.$effectiveIgnoreMK1Supply else true ]

set_value.name: $blacklistgroup
set_value.exact: if this.$blacklistgroup? then this.$blacklistgroup else blacklistgroup.civilian

do_if.value: this.$gtRejectSearchMethod? and $needsEscape and ((not this.$gtRejectTradeListCountSafe? or this.$gtRejectTradeListCountSafe == 0) or (this.$gtRejectBlacklistedSafe? and this.$gtRejectTradeListCountSafe? and this.$gtRejectBlacklistedSafe == this.$gtRejectTradeListCountSafe))

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': ESCAPE FALLBACK: No valid escape trade found (all trades blacklisted) - moving toward home sector'

set_value.name: $cacheHardRejectTotal
set_value.exact: this.$gtRejectPathSafe + this.$gtRejectDockingSafe + this.$gtRejectDistanceSafe + this.$gtRejectCargoSafe + this.$gtRejectRestrictionSafe + this.$gtRejectBlacklistedSafe

set_value.name: $cacheExhaustHomeSector
set_value.exact: if this.$lastPriorityWaresHome? and this.$lastPriorityWaresHome.exists then this.$lastPriorityWaresHome else (if this.$effectiveHome? and this.$effectiveHome.isclass.sector then this.$effectiveHome else (if this.$effectiveHome? and this.$effectiveHome.sector? then @this.$effectiveHome.sector else this.ship.sector))

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Cache batch exhausted (transient-only) — retrying cache before live (' + this.$gtRejectTradeListCountSafe + '/' + $cacheExhaustPoolSize + ' entries tried, home=' + (if $cacheExhaustHomeSector.knownname? then @$cacheExhaustHomeSector.knownname else '?') + ')'

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Ship = this.ship, $HomeBase = if this.$effectiveHome? then this.$effectiveHome else (if this.ship.defaultorder and this.ship.defaultorder.$home? then @this.ship.defaultorder.$home else this.ship.sector), $MaxBuy = $signalMaxBuy, $MaxSell = $signalMaxSell, $IgnoreCarrierAux = @this.$effectiveIgnoreCarrierAux, $IgnoreBuildStorage = @this.$effectiveIgnoreBuildStorage, $IgnoreTradeRules = @this.$effectiveIgnoreTradeRules, $IgnoreMK1Supply = if this.$effectiveIgnoreMK1Supply? then this.$effectiveIgnoreMK1Supply else true, $SearchPool = 'mk4_supply_v2', $SearchDepth = if this.$effectiveSearchDepth? then this.$effectiveSearchDepth else 30, $ForceLiveSearch = false, $LiveSearchPriority = false ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Cache exhausted — all ' + this.$gtRejectTradeListCountSafe + ' cache candidates failed validation, triggering LIVE market search' + '\n Rejection breakdown: Path=' + this.$gtRejectPathSafe + ', Docking=' + this.$gtRejectDockingSafe + ', OfferInvalid=' + this.$gtRejectOfferInvalidSafe + ', Distance=' + this.$gtRejectDistanceSafe + ', Cargo=' + this.$gtRejectCargoSafe + ', Restriction=' + this.$gtRejectRestrictionSafe + ', DemandReserved=' + this.$gtRejectDemandReservedSafe + ', Blacklist=' + this.$gtRejectBlacklistedSafe + (if $cacheExhaustPoolSize gt 0 then '\n Home cache pool size: ' + $cacheExhaustPoolSize else '')

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Ship = this.ship, $HomeBase = if this.$effectiveHome? then this.$effectiveHome else (if this.ship.defaultorder and this.ship.defaultorder.$home? then @this.ship.defaultorder.$home else this.ship.sector), $MaxBuy = $signalMaxBuy, $MaxSell = $signalMaxSell, $IgnoreCarrierAux = @this.$effectiveIgnoreCarrierAux, $IgnoreBuildStorage = @this.$effectiveIgnoreBuildStorage, $IgnoreTradeRules = @this.$effectiveIgnoreTradeRules, $IgnoreMK1Supply = if this.$effectiveIgnoreMK1Supply? then this.$effectiveIgnoreMK1Supply else true, $SearchPool = 'mk4_supply_v2', $SearchDepth = if this.$effectiveSearchDepth? then this.$effectiveSearchDepth else 30, $ForceLiveSearch = true, $LiveSearchPriority = true ]

do_elseif.value: this.$gtRejectSearchMethod? and (this.$gtRejectSearchMethod == 'live' or this.$gtRejectSearchMethod == 'live_sell_only' or this.$gtRejectSearchMethod == 'live_fallback')

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': All live trades rejected - releasing scheduler slot, backing off before fresh live search' + '\n Rejection breakdown: Path=' + this.$gtRejectPathSafe + ', Docking=' + this.$gtRejectDockingSafe + ', OfferInvalid=' + this.$gtRejectOfferInvalidSafe + ', Distance=' + this.$gtRejectDistanceSafe + ', Cargo=' + this.$gtRejectCargoSafe + ', Restriction=' + this.$gtRejectRestrictionSafe + ', DemandReserved=' + this.$gtRejectDemandReservedSafe + ', Blacklist=' + this.$gtRejectBlacklistedSafe + '\n All ' + this.$gtRejectTradeListCountSafe + ' live trades invalid at validation - skip stale cache on next attempt'

do_if.value: not global.$GT_NoTradeHistory.{this.ship}? or global.$GT_NoTradeHistory.{this.ship} == null or typeof global.$GT_NoTradeHistory.{this.ship} != datatype.list

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': No ' + (if $isCargoDisposal then 'cargo buyer' else 'profitable trades') + ' found (attempt ' + $failureCount + ') - waiting ' + (this.$retryCooldown/1s) + 's before retry'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Entering wait for ' + (this.$retryCooldownMin/1s) + '-' + (this.$retryCooldownMax/1s) + 's at game time ' + player.age
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Trade found during retry wait - stored ' + (if $intSignalTradeList != null then $intSignalTradeList.count else 0) + ' trades from interrupt payload'

not $isCargoDisposal and not $tradeFoundDuringWait and (this.$retryCooldown == 60s or ($isCriticalReason and $failureCount ge 2))

do_elseif.value: @this.ship.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and (((@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') and @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$logbookentries) or (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') and @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.$logbookentries))

set_value.name: $cargoDescription
set_value.exact: if $cargoTypes.count gt 0 then $cargoTypes.{1} + (if $cargoTypes.count gt 1 then ', ' + $cargoTypes.{2} else '') + (if $cargoTypes.count gt 2 then ', ...' else '') else 'Unknown'

set_value.name: $logbookMessage
set_value.exact:
'Commander,

I have been unable to find a buyer for my cargo after multiple attempts. My cargo hold contains: ' + $cargoDescription + '

I have tried ' + $failureCount + ' times but cannot locate a suitable buyer within my trading range. This may be due to:

- Docking restrictions at available stations

I will continue waiting and retrying periodically. You may want to manually assign a sell order or adjust my trading parameters.

Status: Waiting for buyer opportunity

With patience,

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': LOGBOOK (reason=' + $noTradeReason + ', attempt=' + $failureCount + ', critical=' + $isCriticalReason + ')'

set_value.name: $logbookMessage
set_value.exact:
'Commander,

No trades available — ' + $reasonFriendly + '.

' + 'Ship: ' + this.ship.knownname + '

' + 'Attempts: ' + $failureCount + ' (cooldown reached ' + (this.$retryCooldown/1s) + 's)

set_value.exact: if $rRaw == 'busy' then 'busy' else if $rRaw == 'busy_batch' then 'busy (batch)' else if $rRaw == 'home_refresh' then 'home refresh' else if $rRaw == 'reserved' then 'reserved (fleet)' else if $rRaw == 'blacklist' then 'BLACKLISTED' else if $rRaw == 'all_rejected' then 'all rejected' else if $rRaw == 'trade_rules_violation' then 'trade rules' else if $rRaw == 'offers_expired' then 'offers expired' else if $rRaw == 'insufficient_funds' then 'low funds' else if $rRaw == 'invalid_trade' then 'invalid trade' else if $rRaw == 'no_trade' then 'no trade' else if $rRaw == 'no_cargo' then 'no cargo' else if $rRaw == 'no_gt_order' then 'no GT order' else if $rRaw == 'forced_sell_failed' then 'sell failed' else if $rRaw == 'no_training_stations' then 'no training' else $rRaw

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Cleaned up resupply tracking on order abort'

set_value.name: $debugOrdersStr
set_value.exact: if $debugOrdersList.count gt 0 then $debugOrdersList.{1} + (if $debugOrdersList.count gt 1 then ', ' + $debugOrdersList.{2} else '') + (if $debugOrdersList.count gt 2 then ', ' + $debugOrdersList.{3} else '') + (if $debugOrdersList.count gt 3 then ', ' + $debugOrdersList.{4} else '') + (if $debugOrdersList.count gt 4 then ', ...' else '') else 'NONE'

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] REMOVAL DETECTION DEBUG: ' + $debugShip.idcode + ' - COMPREHENSIVE STATE'
'[GT-AI] Ship: ' + $debugShip.idcode + ' (' + (if $debugShip.knownname then $debugShip.knownname else 'UNNAMED') + ')'
'[GT-AI] Pilot: ' + $debugPilotName + (if $debugPilot != null then ' (exists)' else ' (NONE)')
'[GT-AI] Default Order: ' + (if $debugDefaultOrder then $debugDefaultOrder else 'NONE')
'[GT-AI] Active Orders (' + $debugOrdersCount + '): ' + $debugOrdersStr
'[GT-AI] Commander: ' + $debugCommanderId + ' (Order: ' + $debugCommanderOrder + ')'
'[GT-AI] GT Status: Direct=' + $debugHasDirectGT + ', ViaCommander=' + $debugHasGTCommander + ', InRegistry=' + $debugInRegistry
'[GT-AI] Flags: ActivelyTrading=' + $isActivelyTrading + ', TrainingTransition=' + $isTrainingTransition + ', MaintenanceTransition=' + $isMaintenanceTransition

do_if.value: not $hasDirectGTOrder and this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship

this.ship.commander.defaultorder? and ((@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') or (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2')))

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] PHASE 7: GT order cancelled for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (detected in on_abort, default order: NONE)'

do_if.value: this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship

this.ship.commander.defaultorder? and ((@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') or (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2')))

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Ship = this.ship, $Pilot = this.ship.pilot, $Reason = 'GT order cancelled - restoring original name', $OriginalName = $originalName ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] PHASE 7: Name restoration signal sent for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (was subordinate: ' + $wasSubordinateBeforeCancellation + ', currently subordinate: ' + $isSubordinateOfGTCommander + ', original name: ' + $originalName + ')'

do_if.value: not $hasDirectGTOrder and this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship

this.ship.commander.defaultorder? and ((@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') or (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2')))

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] PHASE 7: GT order cancelled for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (detected in on_abort, default order: ' + $currentDefaultOrder + ', has direct GT: ' + $hasDirectGTOrder + ', has GT commander: ' + $hasGTCommander + ')'

'[GT-AI] PHASE 7: Trade order aborted but GT order still active for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (default order: ' + $currentDefaultOrder + ', has direct GT: ' + $hasDirectGTOrder + ', has GT commander: ' + $hasGTCommander + ') - NOT sending GT_Order_Cancelled'

do_if.value: this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship

this.ship.commander.defaultorder? and ((@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') or (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2')))

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Ship = this.ship, $Pilot = this.ship.pilot, $Reason = 'GT order cancelled - restoring original name', $OriginalName = $originalName ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] PHASE 7: Name restoration signal sent for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (was subordinate: ' + $wasSubordinateBeforeCancellation + ', currently subordinate: ' + $isSubordinateOfGTCommander + ', original name: ' + $originalName + ')'
'[GT-AI] PHASE 7: GT order cancelled for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (detected in on_abort, default order: NONE)'

do_if.value: this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship

this.ship.commander.defaultorder? and ((@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') or (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2')))

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Ship = this.ship, $Pilot = this.ship.pilot, $Reason = 'GT order cancelled - restoring original name', $OriginalName = $originalName ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] PHASE 7: Name restoration signal sent for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (was subordinate: ' + $wasSubordinateBeforeCancellation + ', currently subordinate: ' + $isSubordinateOfGTCommander + ', original name: ' + $originalName + ')'

do_if.value: not $hasDirectGTOrder and this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship

this.ship.commander.defaultorder? and ((@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') or (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2')))

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] PHASE 7: GT order cancelled for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (detected in on_abort, default order: ' + $currentDefaultOrder + ', has direct GT: ' + $hasDirectGTOrder + ', has GT commander: ' + $hasGTCommander + ')'

'[GT-AI] PHASE 7: Trade order aborted but GT order still active for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (default order: ' + $currentDefaultOrder + ', has direct GT: ' + $hasDirectGTOrder + ', has GT commander: ' + $hasGTCommander + ') - NOT sending GT_Order_Cancelled'

do_if.value: this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship

this.ship.commander.defaultorder? and ((@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') or (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and (@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2')))

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Ship = this.ship, $Pilot = this.ship.pilot, $Reason = 'GT order cancelled - restoring original name', $OriginalName = $originalName ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] PHASE 7: Name restoration signal sent for ' + this.ship.idcode + ' (was subordinate: ' + $wasSubordinateBeforeCancellation + ', currently subordinate: ' + $isSubordinateOfGTCommander + ', original name: ' + $originalName + ')'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': on_abort fired but GT order still active (default order: ' + $currentDefaultOrder + ') - skipping Phase 7 (trade order cancellation, not GT order cancellation)'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': GT order still active with training/maintenance transition - skipping Phase 7 (normal transition, not removal)'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Subordinate cleanup signal already sent - skipping duplicate'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': GT order removed (no direct GT, no GT commander) → PERMANENT REMOVAL (actively trading: ' + $isActivelyTrading + ', orders count: ' + $debugOrdersCount + ')'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': GT order still active (direct: ' + $hasDirectGTOrder + ', commander: ' + $hasGTCommander + ') - checking other removal conditions'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': No default order detected → PERMANENT REMOVAL'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Different default order (' + $currentDefaultOrder + ') detected → PERMANENT REMOVAL'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Ship no longer registered in GT_Ships → PERMANENT REMOVAL (even if actively trading)'

do_if.value: this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$OriginalShipName?

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Ship = this.ship, $Pilot = this.ship.pilot, $Reason = 'Order permanently removed by player', $OriginalName = $originalName ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Sending ABORT signal (restore name, preserve XP) - permanent removal detected'

do_elseif.value: not $isActivelyTrading and not $isTrainingTransition and not $isMaintenanceTransition and not $isSubordinate

set_value.name: $pauseData
set_value.exact: table[ $Ship = this.ship, $Pilot = this.ship.pilot, $Reason = 'Order temporarily replaced - preserving pilot data', $PreserveData = true ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Sending PAUSE signal (preserve everything for resume)'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Subordinate with Assist order - NOT sending PAUSE (staying registered)'
'[GT-AI] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Ship still actively trading/training/maintenance - NOT sending signals (will handle when orders complete)'
